college_info.college_name: Sahyadri College of Engineering: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration process has started for Sahyadri College of Engineering admission to the BE/BTech programme. The last date to register is Mar 16, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How are placements at SCEM?
faqs.answer:
Sahyadri College of Engineering placements are good for the students. The college constantly tries to provide good placement opportunities to the students. The highest package offered is INR 40 LPA by Microsoft. The average package offered at the college is 4 LPA. The Campus was visited by 250+ companies during the placement drive. Some of the major recruiters are:
·       Microsoft
·       Google
·       IBM
·       Capgemini

faqs.question: Can I apply directly to Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: Interested candidates who meet the eligibility requirements of the course and have valid scores in the required exam, can apply directly to the college's official website by filling out the available form. Candidates can check for the eligibility criteria available on the official site.

faqs.question: Is Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management has a rating of 4.47 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.59 on Campus Life, 4.45 on Placements, 4.33 on Faculty and 4.54 on Infrastructure.

college_info.intro:
Sahyadri College Mangalore currently offers 7 BE courses at the UG level with 780 seats. The courses are AICTE-approved.
BE course is offered across 7 specialisations:
Eligibility criteria: Candidates must have passed class 12 with 45% marks in PCM/B. Relaxation is given to students belonging to the SC/ST category. College accepts CET and COMEDK exams for the admission to BE programme.
The school also offers two courses at the PG level, i.e. MBA and MTech with 198 seats. The school offers MTech course in Computer Science Engineering. Students can choose from the following specialisations for MBA course:
Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management also offers PhD courses.
Sahyadri College focuses on the idea of Project-Based learning through various initiatives and activities, such experiences help students to gain practical knowledge.
Students get to work on and improve their talents and skills at national and international level events.

placements.overview:
SCEM is dedicated to providing good placements to its students. During the placement drive, 250+ companies visited the campus and more than 700 students got placed. Following are some of the major recruiters at SCEM:

The highest package at SCEM stood at INR 40 LPA, offered by Microsoft. The average salary offered is INR 4 LPA.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered every semester
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 1,30,780 to 10,45,908. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM.

faqs.answer:
A:    Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma and secured 50% marks in aggregate.M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates must have valid GATE score.MCACandidate should have studied Maths at 10+2 stage or at graduation level.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college. All that is needed is some work on college events and attendance allowance.

review_content.Placements: As a student of Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management I found the placements to be strong, with over 260 recruiters and 1,000+ offers. The highest package is 43.98 LPA the average is around 6.3 LPA and the median is 4.7 LPA. Top recruiters include Microsoft Adobe Amazon and SAP. Many students also secured internships at Mahindra MRPL and MCF. Common roles offered are software development data analytics and core engineering positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel life is comfortable with separate boys and girls blocks WiFi study lounges, 24X7 power backup hot water gym access and basic furnishings like a cot cupboard and study table. Students rate the infrastructure highly (4.3/5) though some note that the canteen food prices are a bit steep. Campus has a well-maintained medical center multipurpose sports grounds with a 400 meter track courts for cricket football badminton and basketball along with an indoor gym table tennis chess, and carrom facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good and perfect selection for upcoming students to study.

review_content.Placements: In our college, 80% of students were placed, and I also got placed in a reputed company. The highest package was 40 LPA, and the lowest package was 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Google, Infosys, Tata Electronics, Bosch, Coca-Cola, etc., visited. In our course, more students got selected for internships with KIOCL and Lamina Foundries. The top roles offered to us were in the production and manufacturing departments.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, all things were available, such as the library, Wi-Fi, and canteen facility with good food. Extra classes for students to score high marks in the exams, good hostel facilities, and a good parking area on the campus. Extracurricular activities were also there in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A good environment for education in center of nature,Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students are placed. The highest salary package was 43.43 LPA for the CSE branch in Belc. The average salary package is 3.5 to 4 LPA for all branches. The lowest salary package was 3 LPA overall. Top recruiters include Japanese companies, Karmic Design, Infosys, Rinex Technology, and many more. Around 250+ companies visited and offered 480 offer letters in the last campus drive.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. The hostel is within the campus. It is affordable, clean, well-maintained, and semi-furnished. A dedicated study space is available on each floor. The food has nutritional value, and the quality is very good. Other facilities include Wi-Fi, hot water purifiers, an outdoor gym, an indoor gym, a cricket ground, a football court, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Robotics and Automation - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: We have good faculty, and I think my course is helpful for my future.

review_content.Placements: It's the second batch of Robotics and Automation. 2 students have placed in our branch. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest is 5 LPA. Robotics-based and Mechanical-based companies. Students are doing internships in robotics-based companies. The main role in our branch is to study mechanical & computer science-based courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities in our branch are good and have well knowledge. They are supportive of our studies and project works. Labs, classrooms, library, Wi-Fi are good. I'm staying in a PG, so I don't know much about the hostel. The mess and canteen are okay. The college management is giving great support for sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Mixed Bag: Positive Facilities, Questionable Faculty"

review_content.Placements: I got 89% and above marks. It was a really good package with a great campus, and placements followed excellent rules. Top companies recruited for our course. A high percentage of students secured internships, and the companies offering them were great.
review_content.Infrastructure: Full high-tech companies offered Wi-Fi classrooms and a library that never disappoint. The hostel was really amazing. great mess food, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen was really great. Medical facilities, sports, and games were very grateful.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Robotics and Automation - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Sahyadri College: Good placements, infrastructure & faculty. Some areas for improvement.

review_content.Placements: Sahyadri College has a dedicated placement cell that helps students find job opportunities. The college has tie-ups with over 300 companies, including top recruiters like Infosys, Wipro, TCS, and more. Average salary is 4-5 lakhs per annum. Highest salary is12-15 lakhs per annum. Placement percentage is 80-90%. Students are placed in various sectors, including IT, manufacturing, finance, and more. The college also provides training and development programs to enhance students' employability skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Hostel rooms are spacious and well maintained. Outdoor sports include football, cricket, kabaddi, volleyball, handball, throw ball, basketball, hockey courts. Indoor games include table tennis, badminton and chess. Gym with well equipped fitness center with modern equipment is also there.

The application process is conducted online. Candidates must contact the admission office for more details.

cut_off.college_name: Sahyadri College of Engineering Cutoff 2025: Check Karnataka PGCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Sahyadri College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Sahyadri College of Engineering Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 5727 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 23357 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Sahyadri College of Engineering. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 5727 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 3176, while in 2023, it was 3793.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Sahyadri College of Engineering accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 19138 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 20871, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:
According to the Sahyadri College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Robotics and Automation stood at 55193 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.
Students can use the filters provided below to view the cutoff for other categories and quotas for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

Campus has a well-maintained medical center multipurpose sports grounds with a 400 meter track courts for cricket football badminton and basketball along with an indoor gym table tennis chess, and carrom faci...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and perfect selection for upcoming students to study.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all things were available, such as the library, Wi-Fi, and canteen facility with good food. Extra classes for students to score high marks in the exams, good hostel facilities, and a good parking area on the campus. Extracurricular activities were also there in our college.

reviews.review_heading: A good environment for education in center of nature,Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. The hostel is within the campus. It is affordable, clean, well-maintained, and semi-furnished. A dedicated study space is available on each floor. The food has nutritional value, and the quality is very good. Other facilities include Wi-Fi, hot water purifiers, an outdoor gym, an indoor gym, a cricket ground, a football court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: We have good faculty, and I think my course is helpful for my future.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities in our branch are good and have well knowledge. They are supportive of our studies and project works. Labs, classrooms, library, Wi-Fi are good. I'm staying in a PG, so I don't know much about the hostel. The mess and canteen are okay. The college management is giving great support for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Mixed Bag: Positive Facilities, Questionable Faculty"
reviews.review_text: Full high-tech companies offered Wi-Fi classrooms and a library that never disappoint. The hostel was really amazing. great mess food, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen was really great. Medical facilities, sports, and games were very grateful.

reviews.review_heading: Sahyadri College: Good placements, infrastructure & faculty. Some areas for improvement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Hostel rooms are spacious and well maintained. Outdoor sports include football, cricket, kabaddi, volleyball, handball, throw ball, basketball, hockey courts. Indoor games include table tennis, badminton and chess. Gym with well equipped fitness center with modern equipment is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Sahyadri CollegeOf Engineering and management
reviews.review_text: I have not opted for the hostel facility as I am a day scholar and my friend have opted it the rooms are okay not up to mark but it's fine. One can adjust there comfortably. Hostel have 2 room sharing and 3 room sharing facilities so the canteen and mess. There is fine produces good food not upto mark the perfect rating would be good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall review of college
reviews.review_text: Wifi is there but it lags many of the times and cannot get every where, hostel is costly as it starts from 90000 and goes upto 150000 and the canteen is bit costly for students and taste is average and no separate kitchen for veg and non veg so it will be difficult for vegetarians

reviews.review_heading: Summary of my college.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi of our college is not so good, but the internet connections through the LAN are good; its more than 300 mbps, but the Wi-Fi is too bad. Many of the time it is 2 or 3 mbps speed, not more than that. If you check in your phones, its like 100 or 200 kbps only. The departments, mess, and hostels are good.

reviews.review_heading: Sahyadri college from point of view.
reviews.review_text: The college has a Wi-Fi network that requires you to register, and you will be given an ID and password. Classrooms are pretty decent and huge. Labs are full-fledged, but most of these labs are not equipped with ACs. The college also has a cafeteria, which has a wide food options to choose from.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. Our campus is well-maintained. Classrooms are good. The projectors are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The college buildings are good. Classrooms and labs are good and well-maintained. The hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled, but its speed is slow. Classrooms are clean. The projectors are not working.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sahyadri College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good. The infrastructure is better. Our campus has good environment for learning and growth. Laboratories are well-equipped. There is a decent library in this college. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but the speed is average. Hostel is very good. The food quality is not good. One must follow the timetable for the hostel. The security facility is good in our hostel. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure with the best placements.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has a large playground for sports. The food is not great, but that's understandable as there are a lot of hostelites to be fed. Wi-Fi isn't up to the mark since it is very slow and doesn't often meet the expected speed.

admission_process.title: Saintgits College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Saintgits College of Engineering admission is open for all courses. Admission to UG and PG courses is entrance-based.Saintgits College of Engineeringoffers BTech and MTech at UG and PG levels respectively. The college accepts entrance exams including KEAM and GATE for admission to BTech and MTech courses. All these courses are offered under the affiliation ofAPJ Abdul Kalam Technological University. Interested applicants can apply by visiting the official website of Saintgits Group of Institutions. Read the below article to know more about Saintgits College of Engineering admission process, along with course eligibility and selection criteria:

Saintgits College of Engineering course admission 2025is entrance/merit-based. The college offers more than 10 courses in various teams such as Accounting & Commerce, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Design etc. Check out the following table for details aroundSaintgits College of Engineering course admissions 2025:

Saintgits College of Engineering admission is ongoing for all courses. The college offers entrance-based admission to all courses. The college offers UG and PG, courses, including BTech and MTech. Saintgits College of Engineering offers one undergraduate course, including BTech. The duration of the courses is four years. The college also offers MTech at the postgraduate level with a duration of two years. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The college accepts KEAM exam scores for admission to BTech and GATE exam scores for admission to MTech.

Further, the college also offers admission based on Management quota in both BTech and MTech. The college offers admission to candidates belonging to the Management quota based on the last qualifying exam score followed by merit-based counselling. Want to know other admission-related details about Saintgits College of Engineering course eligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects

Saintgits College of Engineering admission process is open for undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The admission is entrance-based, followed by a counselling round. Applicants must complete the admission process for admission. Check below the Saintgits College of Engineering admission process 2025:
STEP 1: Saintgits College of Engineering Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. The application fee at SCE ranges between INR 250 and INR 400. Students can also check the detailedSaintgits College of Engineering feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Saintgits College of Engineering selects applicants for BTech and MTech based on entrance exams along with counselling such as KEAM and GATE entrance exams.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission for B.Tech at Saintgits College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: No, Saintgits College of Engineering offers entrance-based admission to BTech. Candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and apply for the KEAM entrance exam for admission. After all the procedures the college releases its merit list. If candidates get selected in the merit list they have to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

faqs.question: Can students get selected at Saintgits College of Engineering with CAT range of 60-70 percentile?
faqs.answer: There is not a definite answer of this question. The admission is done on the basis of merit. With 60-70 percentile in CAT you may or may not get selected at Saintgits college of Engineering. Everything is based on number of seats available for the students. If the number of seats available more, then the cutoff will be less and student with less score may also get selected. If the number of seats are less, then the cutoff will be high and you need a very good score in CAT, in order to take admi

faqs.question: How many rounds are there in Saintgits College of Engineering Counseling?
faqs.answer: As per the information posted on the official website of Saintgits college of engineering, there will be one online counselling round for the admission process. After the students qualify the entrance exam and the cutoff, they will be sent date and time for online counselling on thier mail id. The counselling will  be done through digital mode, not offline mode.

The college offers BTech, BDes, MBA courses, etc., at the UG and PG level. apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers PhD courses. faqs.question: Can I get into Saintgits College of Engineering without CAT?
faqs.answer: Saintgits College of Engineering offers a large diversity of courses to students in Management field. Saintgits College of Engineering admissions are held on the basis of entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as KMAT KERALA,  CAT,  CMAT, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.

faqs.question: Can students join Saintgits College of Engineering directly without any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, student cannot take admission in Saintgits college of engineering without any entrance exam. Student need to have a valid score in the entrance exam of the course they are trying to pursue. For eg, for engineering, student need to clear entrance exams like JEE advance or the college's entrance exam. For MBA students need to clear entrance exams like CAT, CMAT, KMAT etc. Student will be given admission according to the merit made on these entrance exams scores. Good score in the entrance exam are desiered in order to take admission without any problem.

faqs.question: Is there any way of applying offline for the Saintgits College of Engineering application form?
faqs.answer: There is no mention of offline application for admission in Saintgits college of engineering on thier official website. But students can apply offline by downloading the application form from the university's official website, fill the form with all details and submit the form to the Institute. For online application, the students need to fill the online application form along with the results of 10th, 12th, entrance exam etc. The online application form link is available for the students on the website. Other documents such as transfer certificate, migration need to be submitted digitally.

placement_report.college_name: Saintgits College of Engineering, Kottayam Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Saintgits College of Engineering Placement Overview
paragraphs: According to Engineering NIRF report 2024 released by Saintgits College of Engineering, the median package offered during BTech and MTech placements 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. Further, as per the Management NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during Saintgits College of Engineering MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 7.40 LPA. I n addition, the College has released the 2023 placement statistics. As per the official website, a total of 224 offers were made and a total of 25 companies were recruited during Saintgits College of Engineering placements 2023. The top recruiters of Saintgits College of Engineering in placements 2023 were TCS, Quest Global, Experion, Federal Bank, Acabes International , etc.

As per the NIRF report 2023, 216 BTech and 33 MTech students were placed during Saintgits College of Engineering placements 2022. The median package offered to BTech and MTech students during Saintgits College of Engineering placements 2022 stood at INR 3.5 LPA and INR 4 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: Can KPMG and Black Rock be considered as some of the top recruiters of Saintgits College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes KPMG and Black Rock can be considered as some of the top recruiters of Saintgits College of Engineering as they have recentky visted the campus for providing olacement opportunities to the students pursuing different courses in the college. They are among the top recruitors which visit the company among many others like TCS and infosys etc. They provide the highest package offered to the students at the university and recruit the students from the university every year.

faqs.question: Does Saintgits College of Engineering offer better placements than MIT-WPU?
faqs.answer: No, Saintgits college of engineering do not have better placements than MIT-WPU. The placement rates and placement packages are better at MIT. According to 2023 data the highest package offered at Saintgits college of engineering was around 10LPA and average was around 4LPA. While in MIT, the highest package offered was around 50 LPA and the average package offered was 7.5LPA. The differences can be clearly seen and by seeing the above figures it can be justified that MIT-WPU is better than Saintgits college of engineering in terms of placements.

faqs.question: Does Saintgits College of Engineering have good placements?
faqs.answer: According to the data provided by the college, Saintgits College of Engineering has good placements. The college has a specialised placement cell that employs modern methodologies to deliver talent that satisfies the requirements of the most demanding national and international recruiters.The college has a wide alumni network working across multiple sectors. The highest salary package offered during the 2023 placement drive was 6 LPA, and the median package offered to BTech and M.Tech students during the 2022 placement drive stood at INR 3.5 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively.The top recruiters of Saintgits College of Engineering in the 2023 placement drive were TCS, Quest Global, Experion, Federal Bank, Acabes International, etc.The college saw its students getting placed with higher salary packages in globally reputed companies like IBM, PWC, EY, TCS, Infosys, etc. in 2022

faqs.question: How are B Tech placements at Saintgits College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The college offers excellent placement opportunities to the students pursuing B.Tech at their college. In 2022, global giants like IBM, PWC, EY, TCS, Infosys etc. recruited the students of the college. This year, the average salary has also increased by 34%. The total number of offers stands at 555 and our students graduating in 2022 have had the opportunity to participate in recruitment drives from 93 companies till date. The average salary of students who have received a B.Tech degree is INR 3.5 Lacs per annum.

faqs.question: Are pursuing UG courses at Saintgits College of Engineering expensive?
faqs.answer: No, pursuing UG courses at Saintgits college of engineering is not expensive. The fee structure of the Institute is reasonable and affordable. The fee for course like BTech is around 3lacs.There are many colleges which charge more than this and are also not value for money also. The Institute provides a good return on the fees invested and your fees will not be wasted in this Institute. The college also provides various scholarship and loan facilities to the meritorious students so that they can get some relief from the fees.

faqs.question: How much does MBA at Saintgits College of Engineering cost?
faqs.answer: MBA at Saintgits college of engineering costs around 4.2 lakhs. The fees can also be paid in installments. There are 4 semester wise installments by which the students will be able to pay the fee easily. The fees is moderately expensive. The meritorious students get various scholarship facilities and loan facilities so that they can get some relief from the fees. The fees may little bit vary according to the specialisation the student is choosing.

faqs.question: How much does MBA at Saintgits College of Engineering cost?
faqs.answer: The Total tuition fees for MBA at Saintgits College of Engineering is Rs 4.20 Lakh. Whereas, hostel fees is about Rs 1.76 Lacs per annum. In this, the meal plan is also included. MBA is a two year course so if we count the total cost then it would be - 4.20 Lacs + ( 1.76 Lacs × 2 ) = Rs 7.72 lakhs.

faqs.question: Do students get their ROI after completing MBA from Saintgits College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, students get a decent return on thier fees which they have invested in doing MBA from Saintgits college of engineering. The fees for the MBA programme at this university is around 2.7lacs for full course. The highest package offered for MBA was around 7.5 LPA, while 4 LPA was the average package which was offered. According to the resonable fees structure, the packages offered are decent. The ROI depends on the student also. If the student works good on his skills he/she may definitely get a good ROI.

hostel_campus.college_name: Saintgits College of Engineering

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for MBA Course.
reviews.review_text: The department's infrastructure is excellent, with well-equipped laboratories, Wi-Fi access, and smart classrooms. The hostels are likewise in decent condition and serve good, simple food. The college has six canteens, which are open until 10 p.m. There are also doctors available. Hostels offer gyms, Wi-Fi, and sports including basketball, soccer, volleyball, cricket, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Saintgits College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Looking for proper guidance in the placement process and when companies arrived, orientations were planned. They explained about the company and other necessities. But students were asked to attend the drives based on the semester scores. Most of the banking sectors and few of the HR based companies offered moderate packages ranging between 3 to 4 CTC.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for an MBA.
reviews.review_text: The amenities for the MBA programme are outstanding. Classrooms are properly outfitted, and laboratories operate with current software. The library is vast, offering excellent study areas. Hostels are acceptable, providing essential facilities, whereas the food standard in the mess is mediocre. Healthcare facilities are available, and there are excellent recreational sports opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: It has a great placement record with humble teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus is very clean and has high-quality equipment. Each of our classrooms is quite large and air-conditioned. There is a large library for helping the students with their studies, where there are various journals and magazines from home and abroad. There is also a cafeteria for students in their free time. There is a large field for sports along with studies. Hostels are well-equipped with special facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Best place to learn some damaged and great things.
reviews.review_text: The college consists of free high-speed Wi-Fi network, specific libraries for department special text, and a single integrated library which consists of both physical and book sections and is inclusive of a networking library. Classrooms are well-equipped with display systems. College hostel is within walking distance of the campus and provides quality facilities with a nearby hospital, college ground, prepared food, etc.

reviews.review_heading: We have strong robotics exposure, decent placements, and good campus life.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs for mechatronics, control systems, microcontrollers, and industrial automation. The department supports minor and major projects. Hostel facilities are good. Discipline is maintained. Mess is good. The food is good but not that great. The hostel and college have Wi-Fi availability.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The campus has well infrastructure, with average classrooms with projectors. There is a central library with specific departmental libraries. The campus also has three canteens and sports grounds for football, cricket, volleyball, and basketball. The hostel facilities are available separately for both boys and girls, with the girls’ hostel inside the premises of the college campus. The food and accommodation are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, high-tech labs, a common library with separate departmental libraries, three canteens, well-conditioned classrooms, and washrooms for both teachers and staff. The hostel, food, and accommodation for both boys and girls separately, along with good-conditioned rooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. Teachers were very helpful to academics.
reviews.review_text: There are well-maintained labs and facilities. The hostel is very good and the food is also good and also there are sports activities. The infrastructure and facilities are good. There are many good libraries, labs, classrooms, gardens, a canteen, and good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is good. All are friendly. I'm satisfied with college life, academics, and friends.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure of Saintgits is fabulous. College has Wi-Fi for all the blocks and each department has its library, we do have one main big library in which we can take books for reference. The food available in the canteen is affordable and good for the price they are serving it. College has 3 main areas for having snacks/ food, each of these has soft drinks and coffee outlets. The college has a medical room. Sports and games are there, but you can access them after the regular classes so if...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and smart classrooms are there. Washrooms are clean and tidy. Hostel facilities are also nice and food is also good. Hostel rooms and bathrooms are also neat. There are total 3 canteens in the college, and the food is also good for the price. This college supports a lot of sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: An ordinary review of an ordinary student.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good hostel facilities. There are multiple hostels based on which department you are studying in. They provide good bathroom facilities. They also provide great food. They allow students to go out on weekends and so on. It's a great experience.

reviews.review_heading: That's all about my college. Well, a bit strict, but a lot of opportunities to grow.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure just stands out. The amphitheater is for programs, the auditorium for other events, even TEDx events are held at our college, and the library is really helpful. Every department has its own library and also a common library where all students study during the exams.

reviews.review_heading: Top-notch facilities and an environment that helps you achieve personal and professional growth.
reviews.review_text: The university is good and has the best infrastructure. Classrooms and campus are kept clean. There is Wi-Fi and well-equipped laboratory facilities on campus. The classrooms are smart. There is a library at our university. The food in the kitchen is good, the food in the canteen is good, and the accommodation has good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Exceptional education is provided by supportive and experienced staff and professors.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very helpful. Excellent food and services are provided at our college. Our college organizes classrooms with intellectual resources. New research tools are available. It provides 24/7 Wi-Fi connectivity. It has a spacious, well-appointed, and clean guest room. It has a great stage. All sports equipment is available. It has a gym with all the equipment.

paragraphs: No, pursuing UG courses at Saintgits college of engineering is not expensive. The fee structure of the Institute is reasonable and affordable. The fee for course like BTech is around 3lacs.There are many colleges which charge more than this and are also not value for money also. The Institute provides a good return on the fees invested and your fees will not be wasted in this Institute. The college also provides various scholarship and loan facilities to the meritorious students so that they can get some relief from the fees.

MBA at Saintgits college of engineering costs around 4.2 lakhs. The fees can also be paid in installments. There are 4 semester wise installments by which the students will be able to pay the fee easily. The fees is moderately expensive. The meritorious students get various scholarship facilities and loan facilities so that they can get some relief from the fees. The fees may little bit vary according to the specialisation the student is choosing.

MBA at Saintgits College of Engineering is not very costly. The college provides good placement opportunities to the students pursuing MBA in their college. The total tuition fees for pursuing MBA at Saintgits College of Engineering is INR 4.2 Lacs for a 2 year MBA program. The college also provides the facility of hostel for both boys and girls for which the cost is rupees 1.6 Lacs per annum. The total seat intake of students for MBA at the college is around 120 while the median salary provided to the students pursuing MBA in the college is around rupees 4 Lacs per annum.

Yes, students get a decent return on thier fees which they have invested in doing MBA from Saintgits college of engineering. The fees for the MBA programme at this university is around 2.7lacs for full course. The highest package offered for MBA was around 7.5 LPA, while 4 LPA was the average package which was offered. According to the resonable fees structure, the packages offered are decent. The ROI depends on the student also. If the student works good on his skills he/she may definitely get a good ROI.

faqs.answer: A:    Getting into Don Bosco Institute of Technology, Mumbai was tough based on the course being opted for. Typically, the institute follows the merit-based system through entrance exams like MHT-CET and JEE Main where candidates need to score well. Cutoff ranks vary per branch and category; for example, computer engineering is a huge stream and its cutoffs are pretty high. While not the hardest college to get into, its admission does require a really good academic performance and competitive entrance exam scores, especially for some of the more in-demand programs.
faqs.question: Is Don Bosco Institute of Technology Mumbai hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    Don Bosco Institute of Technology (DBIT) in Mumbai accepts MHT-CET (Maharashtra Common Entrance Test) marks as the primary exam for state quota admissions. JEE Main scores are also evaluated for students outside Maharashtra or those seeking admission under the All India quota. Candidates must participate in the Maharashtra State CET Cell's Centralized Admission Process (CAP), in which their MHT-CET or JEE Main scores are used to determine seat allocation. Admission is based on merit, and the cutoff scores vary according to the course, exam, and student category.

reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is very helpful, and it coordinates with students. It provides the necessary details. They also give insights and prepare their students. Many students got placed at very good companies and with better packages compared to other colleges and other placement cells.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is very nice. It has a spacious library and classrooms for students to study. It has an amazing canteen facility. The hygiene is also maintained. It also has amazing medical facilities and different games or sports zones.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college in Mumbai. Placements are good compare to other tier 3 colleges in Mumbai.

review_content.Placements: It is difficult to say the exact percentage because placements are still ongoing, but more than 50% of eligible students with a 6.75 CGPA are placed. The highest packages are offered by Godrej and Keyence for the mechanical department, which are 7.5 LPA and 6.91 LPA, respectively. Other companies like Bajaj Mukund, Thermax, Aker Solutions, Econship, and many local companies visit our campus with packages ranging from 3 LPA to 6 LPA. review_summary.college_name: Don Bosco Institute of Technology, Mumbai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with college experience.

content.Placements: From EXTC average package is 10 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA. Top company is L&T. L&T has internship paid programs upto Rs 5,000 to Rs 10,000. 90% of students got internships. Overall college placement percentage is above 90%. Top roles as in class representative, tech representative, and sports representative are the roles that are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is there and allowed mostly in libraries but sometimes they allow us to use canteen and lab Wi-Fi. Classrooms are spacious. Food is really good. Canteens are also renovated now. I don't know about mess and hostel though. Medical facilities are there. There is a first aid room.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 0
individual_reviews.title: About 3 years of BE in mechanical engineering.

content.Placements: From the batch of 2025, around 40% of students are placed till now and placements are still on going. The highest package is 9.5 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA - 7 LPA. Amazon, Zepto, Toyo Engineering, TCS, L&T, and these kinds of top companies came for recruitment. 100% of internships are provided by the college. Top roles like junior engineer in L&T and hub manager in Zepto are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided on all floors. All the labs are better and internet is provided in computer labs like solidworks labs and simulation labs. In library, there is Wi-Fi. There is one digital library where you can download paid research papers and books for free of cost. Hostel is not in our college but hostel cell provides better hostels in a nearby location which has amenities like Wi-Fi, ACs, and washing machines.

The faculty members are supportive of any academic or personal problems that we face and thus maintain cordial relations with students.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in Don Bosco Institute of Technology, Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: College has decent facilities, including a good canteen, spacious library, and football grounds. College has Wi-Fi across the campus. Each department has about 7 to 8 labs. Infrastructure is not so fascinating, but still, it is well-equipped with projectors and smart TVs.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by the college because of their facilities and other good infrastructure
reviews.review_text: The campus is well organized in Don Bosco. Also, there a two canteens for students. All the labs, canteens, Libraries, session halls are having wifi facilities. There are cultural events celebrated in our college on a huge level. Students from DBIT compete at University level championships where they also come back with flying colours. There are separate common rooms for boys and girls in both the streams, this includes the indoor games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Healthy Competition among crowd and so helps you grow as an  individual.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are good, and there is a huge library with a good collection of books and well-maintained sitting areas. DBIT doesn't have its own hostel as of 2024, but you can find PG accommodations nearby. Godrej, Tata Power, Sahaj, Compress, Simpolo, etc., are some of the companies that come for placements.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Don Bosco Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The library as well as classrooms are well managed and cleaned every time. Wi-Fi is available only in the library and in some classrooms and seminar halls. There are two canteens: one is Cafe Bosco, and the other is an old canteen that gives good food in good quantity.

reviews.review_heading: For placement and academic purposes, it was best college. But not for hostel life.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is so large in Mumbai main region that all types of amenities are present, like Wi-Fi, labs, air conditioning, classrooms, labs with precise instruments, etc. The reading hall is also very large, with all the facilities, like laptops and reference books, in a peaceful environment. Hostel facilities are available for long-distance travelers, and the cafeteria area was very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college for catholic students!
reviews.review_text: All the computers have a strong Ethernet connection. There are around 8 labs just for the Comp department. A big field, a basketball court, and a volleyball court are also available. There are two canteens that provide excellent food at affordable prices. A common room for both boys and girls is there, with Foosball table, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have its own hostel. But the infrastructure of the college building is beautiful. Labs are full of amenities. PGs are available around the college. The college is walking distance from Vidyavihar station. A canteen is also available in college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Our college has two canteens. The food served in every canteen is good. Our college provides Wi-Fi with a speed of 50 Mbps. Our college provides games and sports like basketball, football, cricket, carrom, chess, table tennis, etc.

college_info.college_name: Don Bosco Institute of Technology, Mumbai

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Don Bosco Institute of Technology, Mumbai

likes.text: Already big companies like Infosys, Jio, topper, Airtel, and other companies like Tata, Mahindra, etc., are partners of DBIT college which is nice.
Being a part of placement committee, I came to know what efforts were taken by the college to get students placed.

review_summary.college_name: NRTI Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (Transportation and Logistics) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Unique AI & Data Science program with top faculty and real-world projects.

content.Placements: Overall, about 91% of students get placed, with approximately 92% in core branches like ECE. For AI, the average package is about 5-6 LPA, and top offers reach 13-14 LPA. Prominent recruiters include Airbus, L&T, Siemens, Aditya Birla Group, DFCCIL, RITES, IBM, Nokia, Adani Group, Mahindra Logistics, and Hitachi. Internships are compulsory each year, starting with opportunities at Indian Railways in the second year and extending to PSUs and private firms thereafter. Notably, CRIS, Indian Railways, DFCCIL, RITES, and CONCOR have hosted AI interns.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is a sprawling 55-acre woody area inside NAIR, featuring air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi, well-furnished hostels, and shared messing facilities. For hostel accommodation, 2nd-year students typically live in rented off-campus hostels, with an on-campus hostel expected by 2026. Regarding facilities, there's a good library and reliable Wi-Fi. Sports infrastructure is limited due to shared NAIR grounds, but extracurricular clubs (tech, cultural, sports) are functional.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical and Rail Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Gati Shakti Vishwavidyalaya Vadodara College.

content.Placements: Placements in my college are average. The maximum package is 8 LPA. The lowest is 2 LPA. 100% of placements are there. If students do not want to get placement, there is a beneficial to the UPSC railway board exam like DRM. Overall, the college and placements are very good.
content.Infrastructure: In rooms, ethernet and full Wi-Fi are given to us. Attached bathrooms are available in every room. Every alternate day cleaning is done in rooms by staff. The mess food is of very good quality. 4 times food is provided to us. The food is northern, southern, etc. We have clubs like Techno Crats Club for coding, robotics, and profile development purposes and Malhar Club for singing, dancing, business, and management. Sports facilities are cricket, football, volleyball, badminton, table tennis, and kabaddi. The mess facility is very good. The library facility is also very good. We have very good Wi-Fi.

faqs: How much rank should I score to get a seat at National Rail and Transportation Institute?
description: National Rail and Transportation Institute cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the National Rail and Transportation Institute JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

National Rail and Transportation Institute JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 108136, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the National Rail and Transportation Institute B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 83219 and 212417 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 83219 and 105239, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (Transportation and Logistics) and B.Tech. in Aviation Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at National Rail and Transportation Institute. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at National Rail and Transportation Institute

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of National Rail and Transportation Institute. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

hostel_campus.college_name: NRTI Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Unique AI & Data Science program with top faculty and real-world projects.
reviews.review_text: Campus is a sprawling 55-acre woody area inside NAIR, featuring air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi, well-furnished hostels, and shared messing facilities. For hostel accommodation, 2nd-year students typically live in rented off-campus hostels, with an on-campus hostel expected by 2026. Regarding facilities, there's a good library and reliable Wi-Fi. Sports infrastructure is limited due to shared NAIR grounds, but extracurricular clubs (tech, cultural, sports) are functional.

reviews.review_heading: Gati Shakti Vishwavidyalaya Vadodara College.
reviews.review_text: In rooms, ethernet and full Wi-Fi are given to us. Attached bathrooms are available in every room. Every alternate day cleaning is done in rooms by staff. The mess food is of very good quality. 4 times food is provided to us. The food is northern, southern, etc. We have clubs like Techno Crats Club for coding, robotics, and profile development purposes and Malhar Club for singing, dancing, business, and management. Sports facilities are cricket, football, volleyball, badminton, table tennis, and...

reviews.review_heading: Gati shakti Vishwa Vidyalaya, Vadodara .
reviews.review_text: Hostels are so good, one can't find in any college. Ac rooms are provided. 2 seater rooms are there. The bathroom is attached, Wi-Fi facility is provided all over campus. Meals are very good there are variations every month. Affordability is very nice. Facilities given to us can't be provided to us under what we pay. We don't even pay for 40% of the facilities. In college Wi-Fi, labs, and libraries are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Gati Shakti Vishwavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: Hostel Facilities: HOSTELS ARE SO GOOD ONE CAN'T FIND IN ANY COLLEGE. AC ROOMS ARE PROVIDED. 2-SEATER ROOMS ARE THERE. BATHROOM IS ATTACHED. Wi-Fi FACILITY IS PROVIDED ALL OVER CAMPUS. MEAL IS VERY GOOD; THERE ARE VARIATIONS EVERY MONTH. AFFORDABILITY IS VERY NICE. FACILITIES GIVEN TO US CAN'T BE PROVIDED UNDER WHAT WE PAY. WE DON'T EVEN PAY 40%.

reviews.review_heading: Going in the top 10 within 5 years.
reviews.review_text: Academic building is very good and more beautiful than IITs. The mess food is good. All hostel rooms are equipped with air-conditioning and attached bathrooms. They are very neat, clean, and very beautiful. Hostels are so good, such hostels are not available in any college in India.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, faculty members are good like the school type. They are good in manner.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good like sports, clubs, and air-conditioned rooms. Hostels and free medical facilities are available. Camps are well-designed and zero-ragging. The campus is beautiful. In rooms, ethernet and full Wi-Fi are provided to students. Attached bathrooms are available in every room. On alternate days, rooms are cleaned by staff. The quality of food in the mess is very good. It offers 4-times food to students. Food includes both northern, southern, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Finally I again tell that the College is very good.
reviews.review_text:
I liked the college campus it's really very nice and beautiful. College faculty members were nice, all are from respected IITs and IIMs completed their studies. They are focused on learning and developing the skills of the students.
Hostel Facilities: I think my hostel facilities are really so nice I don't think in all over India any other colleges provide that type of hostel facilities even the IITs do not provide that type of good facilities. They are providing AC rooms with fully furnished cl...

reviews.review_heading: This is a unique college in India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well-designed. It has a highly integrated library, high-tech and digital classrooms, along with equipped Physics and Chemistry labs and a computer lab. The hostels are very good and provide a bed and an almirah with the room with the AC, and in each, two students are kept. The food quality is good and hygienic. No canteen facilities or medical facilities are available. Sports condition is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: National Rail and Transportation Institute, Ministry of Railways - A Hidden Gem.
reviews.review_text: There are air conditioners, geysers, washing machines, and personal bathrooms for every student in our college. Every room has Wi-Fi, which provides us high-speed internet. Our classrooms and libraries are equipped with air conditioners and Wi-Fi to ensure comfort and connectivity. We have a world-class mess facility serving us four delicious meals a day with varying cuisines. There are badminton courts, basketball and volleyball courts, a football field, and a cricket field on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best transportation college which will give competition to NITs in upcoming years.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at NRTI is really beautiful. There are different kinds of beautiful places on campus, from the greenery to the historic buildings. The hostels provide the best facilities, even compared to many famous colleges.

reviews.review_heading: A good university possesses significant potential for further development.
reviews.review_text: The institute is under construction so first-year boys right now get a hostel outside campus. But girls get hostels inside university premises. As this is a government college, you get freedom in your college life. You can roam around the college until 11 pm .

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good. The course is the best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The sports ground is huge. We have a volleyball court and a basketball court. All classrooms have digital smart boards and Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good Infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Auditorium is available. There is a decent library in this college. Free Wi-Fi is available. Hostels are very good. Double-bedded and triple-bedded air-conditioned rooms are available in the hostel. You can also play sports table tennis in the hostel. Television room is available. The food served in the mess is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Here I will recommend this college to you guys if you have the interest to do something different.
reviews.review_text: If here we talk about infrastructure it is not to God here but I can say that it is not also too bad here. NRTI (now GSV) have all types of the laboratory on campus. But they don't have enough space for activities all are acquired NAIR. But I can assure you that this institute has very good greenery across the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Rail and Transportation Institute.
reviews.review_text: This institute does not have a fixed campus. As a result, students are given access to accommodation options on campus that are shared with NAIR and HSRTI. Hostels are good. A new laboratory is also available. NAIR and NRTI both have access to the same library. Wi-Fi is available on our campus but occasionally it goes down because they shared with Indian Railway officers. There are some restrictions on the use of sports facilities. The food served in a mess is better.

faqs.question: Which course is best for placements at Usha Martin University?

faqs.answer: A:    Usha Martin University offers BTech as well. Over 80 multinational corporations (MNCs) have held campus recruitment programs for the graduating batches, demonstrating the effectiveness of this titanic endeavor. Wipro, Reliance, Bajaj, Capgemini, TCS, are to name a few. Highest package offered in BTech has been 10LPA and the lowest package has been 3-5 LPA in year 2022-23. Usha Martin University has a decent placement cell who groom students for interview rounds.
faqs.question: What is the placement record for B.Tech course in Usha Martin University?

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
More than 30 courses are available at Usha Martin University in a variety of subject areas, including engineering, applied sciences, management, pharmacy, computing and information technology, humanities, agriculture, journalism, and mass communication.

Among other undergraduate programs, the university provides BCA, BBA, B.Com, BA(Hons), BTech, BA LLB, BPT, BPharma, and BA JMC. The university provides PG programs in MBA, MCA, MA, LLB, and LLM. The table below allows candidates to view Usha Martin University's course offerings, eligibility requirements, and total course cost:

faqs.answer: A:    Those who qualify the PI round must pay the prescribed fee to confirm their admission. The total tuition fee for the UMU MBA course amounts to INR 6.78 Lacs for two years. This fees can be paid via net banking, credit card, or debit card.Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MBA programme at Usha Martin University?

faqs.answer: A:    Usha Martin University allocates seats on the basis of marks obtained in the qualifying examination. However, these seats are subject to the rules of reservation. As per the reservation policy, a total of 50% of seats are reserved for SC/ST/OBC category students. A breakdown of this reservation policy is given below:CategoryReservationSC10%ST26%OBC14%General50%
faqs.question: Is there any seat reservation policy at Usha Martin University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, a student can get admission in BCom courses at UMU without a CUET score. Any student who has passed Class 12 with a minimum mark of 50% in aggregate is eligible to apply for the aforementioned courses. Moreover, the selection is also made on the basis of Class 12 marks and the university's seat intake.
faqs.question: Can I join Usha Martin University BCom programme without CUET?

faqs.answer: A:    Usha Martin University accepts CUET-UG for BPharma and other UG programmes. Candidates are required to clear the entrance exam after the application process is done. Since the CUET-UG results are declared candidates can visit the official website of the university and check their respective cut-offs for the programmes they have applied for. The scorecards will be released after the normalization of scores all test takers as the exam was held on multiple days.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted for BPharma at Usha Martin University?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement support and practical learning, but curriculum and activities need upgrades.

review_content.Placements: Currently pursuing a BCA from Usha Martin University, I’ve found the placement opportunities to be quite promising. Around 70 to 80% of students from our course are placed through campus drives. The highest package offered so far has gone up to 10 LPA, while the average package ranges between 3.5 to 4 LPA. Most of my seniors received packages around 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: As a BCA student at Usha Martin University, I’d say the facilities and infrastructure for our course are quite decent. Our department has well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet access. There’s Wi-Fi available across the campus, including in the labs and library, which helps a lot during assignments or project work. The classrooms are spacious and have projectors for smart learning sessions. The university library is also a good resource. It has a wide range of books, journals, and e-resources that we can access for academic use.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Teachers are well-qualified and also knowledgeable.

review_content.Placements: 60-70% of students were placed in good companies, getting jobs ranging from 3.5 LPA to 10 LPA, including Tata, Airtel, Tech Mahindra, Reliance, and others. Almost 80% of students also got internships, mostly with IT companies like Q Spider, Pentagon Space, etc. MBA, BBA, Pharmacy, LL.B., and many more were good courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Almost all facilities were available, like systems, boards, and AC in the labs, and everything was good in the classrooms with smart boards. In the libraries, almost all books were available. The food quality in the hostel was good, and the taste was also not bad. Sports and medical facilities were also available in our hostel.

review_summary.college_name: Usha Martin University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good on the campus.

content.Placements: Everything is good and going smoothly because we have supportive staff members in the training and placement department. They help us and support our needs, and also guide students in their own careers and tech. They also guide on placements.
content.Infrastructure: All things on the campus are good. The conditions of the campus are good.
content.Faculty: All staff members of my college and the examination department are really good. They help and support students. If students face any problem, then they really help them in a good manner. They are always ready to help us. They are really very kind. All staff members, both teaching and non-teaching staff members, are very good. They always tell students to focus on their career and tech.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good for placements and a good infrastructure with all facilities.

content.Placements: 80% of students got placed. The highest package is 10 LPA and the lowest package is 1.5 LPA. Internship opportunities at my college are also good. All batch gets good internship opportunities in all fields for their future benefits and if they do great in internships they get an offer for a permanent job.
content.Infrastructure: Given all facilities Wi-Fi, labs, library, and washing machines are available. The quality of the food in canteen is also good. Medical support is also available 24/7, with extracurricular activities on campus like in-ground gym, basketball, badminton courts, volleyball and a great ground for cricket lovers.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placement support and practical learning, but curriculum and activities need upgrades.

content.Placements: Currently pursuing a BCA from Usha Martin University, I’ve found the placement opportunities to be quite promising. Around 70 to 80% of students from our course are placed through campus drives. The highest package offered so far has gone up to 10 LPA, while the average package ranges between 3.5 to 4 LPA. Most of my seniors received packages around 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: As a BCA student at Usha Martin University, I’d say the facilities and infrastructure for our course are quite decent. Our department has well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet access. There’s Wi-Fi available across the campus, including in the labs and library, which helps a lot during assignments or project work. The classrooms are spacious and have projectors for smart learning sessions. The university library is also a good resource. It has a wide range of books, journals, and e-resources that we can access for academic use.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are well-qualified and also knowledgeable.

content.Placements: 60-70% of students were placed in good companies, getting jobs ranging from 3.5 LPA to 10 LPA, including Tata, Airtel, Tech Mahindra, Reliance, and others. Almost 80% of students also got internships, mostly with IT companies like Q Spider, Pentagon Space, etc. MBA, BBA, Pharmacy, LL.B., and many more were good courses.
content.Infrastructure: Almost all facilities were available, like systems, boards, and AC in the labs, and everything was good in the classrooms with smart boards. In the libraries, almost all books were available. The food quality in the hostel was good, and the taste was also not bad. Sports and medical facilities were also available in our hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Hey, I am Rishav Raj, and I am grateful to write a review about our college.

content.Placements: Companies come to our college for internships. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the lowest package is 2-3 LPA. In our college, various faculty members are available and helpful to students. The campus is like heaven.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructures are best in our college. Hostel and other things provided. Many types of things that can help to increase more students, and have various types of activities like football stadium also there in our college. The name is Amitabh Choudhary Stadium.

admission_overview.college_name: Usha Martin University Admission 2025 (Open): Eligibility, Selection Process, Dates

admission_process.title: Usha Martin University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Usha Martin University admission 2025 is open.Candidates seeking admission can apply online by visiting the official website of UMU. Usha Martin University admission to the majority of courses is merit-based. Candidates seeking admission can apply online by visiting the official website of the college. Usha Martin Universityoffers over31 programmesacross10 streams. The University offers BCA, BBA, B.Com, BA(Hons), BTech, BA LLB, BPT, BPharma, and BA JMC, among others at UG level. At PG level, the university offers MBA, MCA, MA, LLB, LLM. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to full fill the admission criteria set by the college. Given below are more updates related to Usha Martin University admission. course wise eligibility, selection criteria and admission process:

Usha Martin University offers admission to all its UG and PG programmes on the basis of candidates’ performance in the last qualifying examination. Candidates seeking admission to any of the courses can apply both online as well as offline.Usha Martin University coursesalong with their selection criteria are given below:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 12 from a state board with Physics, Chemistry and Maths as main subjects

Merit-based

Merit-based

Merit-based

Merit-based
's admission procedure incluUsha Martin Universitydes multiple steps. The admission is conducted in both online and offline mode. Find belowUsha Martin University admission process:
Step 1: Usha Martin University Application Process

Candidates must visit the official website of Usha Martin University to apply online. For the offline mode, candidates can download the admission form for their selected programme from the university website and submit the duly filled forms to the University at the suggested address.
Step 2: Usha Mertin University Shortlisting

Candidates are shortlisted based on candidate's performance in their last qualifying exam and also in the entrance exams. The university also conducts entrance test for few courses and personal interviews for selections.
Step 3: Usha Mertin University Final Admission
Shortlisted candidates must pay the admission fee to finalise their seats in the university.

faqs.question: What is the cost of BSc at Usha Martin University?
faqs.answer: The overall cost of BSc at Usha Martin Univesity is aroundINR 2.2 Lacs - INR 10.2 lakh.The BSc fees also includes multiple components such as exam fees, development fees, caution deposit fees, etc. Candidates must pass class 12 in Science stream from a state bord to get admission at BSc programme. BSc selection is merit based. However, the university does accepts CUET scores.

BTech selection is merit-based. However, the university does accept CUET scores.

The scorecards will be released after the normalization of scores all test takers as the exam was held on multiple days.

Also, candidates must have a valid score inTSICET/APICET/CAT/XATexams to get shortlisted for the MBA programme.

faqs.question: Is Usha Martin University good for BTech?
faqs.answer: Usha Martin University (UMU),  Ranchi isan ISO 9001:2015 Certified University.It has been recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC), Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), and is amember of the Association of Indian Universities (AIU). The University is renowned for its advanced academic resources, well-qualified faculty, and a wide range of extracurricular, cultural, and sports activities. As for the placements, which is the overall good. A total of73 students were placedin leading companies such as SBI Life Insurance, ESAF Small Finance Bank, Vivo, and many others. MBA emerged as thetop departmentwith the highest number of students placed. Further, theUsha Martin Universitythe highest packageoffered during 2023 placements wasINR 10 LPA.

faqs.question: How good is Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education and Training, MIT ADT University in terms of ranking?
faqs.answer: Maharashtra Academy of Naval Education and Training is a new specialised navy academy established in 2018 by MIT ADT University in association with the Indian Navy. While it does not rank among top colleges presently, it has approvals from DG Shipping and AICTE. Its parent MIT ADT University also has low rankings currently. However, the focused naval training and connections with the Navy provide good credibility and prospects. The BTech Marine Engineering programme is the flagship course. Though traditional rankings are low owing to nascency, the niche focus provides potential for future growth and placements in the naval domain.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to D.Pharma at Usha Martin University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who are seeking admission to the UMU DPharma course must ensure that they are eligible to apply in the first place. If eligible, they can fill out the course-specific application form via online or offline mode. The application for the DPharma programme is INR 500.After the application stage is completed, the university will communicate the rest of the admission requirements via mail. Students must follow the steps mentioned in the mail. Those who are offered admission must pay the fees to confirm their seat.

highlights.description: Usha Martin University is one of India’s top institutes.
