reviews.review_heading: Everything is good on the campus.
reviews.review_text: All things on the campus are good. The conditions of the campus are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good for placements and a good infrastructure with all facilities.
reviews.review_text: Given all facilities Wi-Fi, labs, library, and washing machines are available. The quality of the food in canteen is also good. Medical support is also available 24/7, with extracurricular activities on campus like in-ground gym, basketball, badminton courts, volleyball and a great ground for cricket lovers.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement support and practical learning, but curriculum and activities need upgrades.
reviews.review_text: As a BCA student at Usha Martin University, I’d say the facilities and infrastructure for our course are quite decent. Our department has well-equipped computer labs with updated systems and internet access. There’s Wi-Fi available across the campus, including in the labs and library, which helps a lot during assignments or project work. The classrooms are spacious and have projectors for smart learning sessions. The university library is also a good resource. It has a wide range of books, journ...

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are well-qualified and also knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Almost all facilities were available, like systems, boards, and AC in the labs, and everything was good in the classrooms with smart boards. In the libraries, almost all books were available. The food quality in the hostel was good, and the taste was also not bad. Sports and medical facilities were also available in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Hey, I am Rishav Raj, and I am grateful to write a review about our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructures are best in our college. Hostel and other things provided. Many types of things that can help to increase more students, and have various types of activities like football stadium also there in our college. The name is Amitabh Choudhary Stadium.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, and the infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel was good. It had all the facilities, but the mess food taste was not up to the mark. Students couldn’t go out after 7 pm and could only roam inside the campus. The college hostel had many facilities like Wi-Fi, 24/7 electricity, both AC and non-AC rooms for students, and common washrooms, as well as attached washrooms for individual rooms.

reviews.review_heading: UMU: A Gateway of Opportunities.
reviews.review_text: UMU provides labs for practical classes and assignments with the latest technology, along with Wi-Fi and table internet connection. UMU also provides a library containing reference books for particular courses. UMU provides spacious and good-quality classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: About Usha Martin University.
reviews.review_text: All classes have free Wi-Fi access. There are electric slab mechanical labs and a physics lab. All classes are very big and have smart boards in them. The college has a very big and central library that has a vast amount of books, with e-library availability. There is a common cafeteria for all students in the college, which has a large variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: For the MCA course facilities and faculty is good at this college.
reviews.review_text: Usha Martin University has a well-maintained and well-developed infrastructure for the MCA course. The college provides Wi-Fi throughout the campus for students and also provides labs, a library, and a canteen. The quality of these facilities is very good. The labs have proper systems for students to do their practical work. The college also provides various types of sports facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Usha Marti University Ranchi.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very much provided here, like Wi-Fi is available everywhere, labs are available and well-maintained classrooms are available. The Central Library is present, where all books and journals are. Hostel facilities are very good and rooms and bathrooms are provided. Mess food is also good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: College has satisfactory facilities and qualified faculty for the MCA Course.
reviews.review_text: Students used to get all the necessary facilities, such as computer labs, WiFi, libraries, canteens, classrooms with modern facilities, etc., at this college. All these facilities are of good quality. Infrastructure for the MCA course is also good. Sports and hostel facilities are also available for the interested students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and qualified faculties.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is well designed and beautiful. We have separate hostels for boys and girls and a common mess for all. The classrooms are well designed and organized. The classrooms even have projectors. And even students get access to the Wi-Fi, and also the university is clean.

reviews.review_heading: UMU: A Maverick Journey to Success.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at our college is very impressive, with different blocks of buildings assigned to specific groups of departments for a comfortable flow of classes. Our institution also has library facilities with a good availability of journals and course books, which can be issued anytime on campus through a library card. The canteen is large and offers a wide variety of food, with proper sanitation maintained by the canteen authority. Medical facilities are also available, including an OPD ...

reviews.review_heading: College for a better future.
reviews.review_text: The building and hostel are very well maintained. The college has a clean and friendly environment that promotes happiness. The canteen and mess provide great food for students. Medical facilities in case of any accidents are also available through OPDs.

reviews.review_heading: I never get bored in my college life. Just some ups and downs happen when thinking of placement.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about facilities, they are, like, okay. The summer season feels totally dead as there are no air conditioners in classes; only in labs will you get air conditioning. There is no Wi-Fi for students. Only some classes have a smart board. The library is on the 1st floor, and all types of books are available for your course-related needs. I don't opt for hostels, so I don't know anything about them, but yeah, there are water problems during summer and the food is also not too good. The ca...

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the good colleges in Mumbai.

review_content.Placements: About 60%-70% of students from the computer department get placed through on-campus drives. The top salary package is 15 LPA, while the average is around 4-5 LPA. Popular companies that recruit from the department include Infosys, Capgemini, TCS, and Godrej. Most qualified students secure internships in different companies, with roles such as software engineer and data analyst being common.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well and good with the library having a Wi-Fi system. We have a canteen with a variety of dishes and labs with new equipment. Some classes with smart board system. The computer department labs with AC system and the latest computers. All classrooms are under camera Surveillance.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Internet of Things and Cyber Security Including Block Chain Technology) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is good, and fests and all other events are celebrated very well.

review_content.Placements: This college has now started placement training from the second year. They started sharing internship opportunities as per companies' requirements, so that students can apply accordingly and gain internships. I think placements and packages will grow further.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, with a triangle-shaped building that has 3 to 4 classrooms on each floor and 1-2 labs on each floor. The building has 7 floors. On the ground floor, there are mechanical and workshop labs, and there is also a workshop lab on the 6th floor. The college has a large playground where students can play sports.

review_summary.college_name: Smt. Indira Gandhi College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering(Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A good college provides not just academic knowledge but also supports physical and personal growth.

content.Placements: In our 2021–25 BE Computer Science batch, 75% of students got placed. The highest package is 7.2 LPA, the lowest 2.4 LPA, and the average 3.6 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. Around 60% secured internships in roles like Junior data analyst and developer.
content.Infrastructure: Colleges provide a cool and peaceful library environment where students can focus on their studies. The library usually includes a wide collection of academic books, magazines, and online resources, becoming a hub for self-learning and exam preparation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The placement cell of this college is very active in bringing each company on board so that students can have their dream packages in their dream companies. The average package of this college is 5.12 LPA. Companies like Dabur, TCS, Wipro, and Infotech come to hire students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is small but pretty decent. Group projects teach collaboration, leadership, and compromises, requiring students to communicate. The food quality is just okay and sports are also being conducted. College is supporting the students too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the good colleges in Mumbai.

content.Placements: About 60%-70% of students from the computer department get placed through on-campus drives. The top salary package is 15 LPA, while the average is around 4-5 LPA. Popular companies that recruit from the department include Infosys, Capgemini, TCS, and Godrej. Most qualified students secure internships in different companies, with roles such as software engineer and data analyst being common.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well and good with the library having a Wi-Fi system. We have a canteen with a variety of dishes and labs with new equipment. Some classes with smart board system. The computer department labs with AC system and the latest computers. All classrooms are under camera Surveillance.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Internet of Things and Cyber Security Including Block Chain Technology) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good, and fests and all other events are celebrated very well.

content.Placements: This college has now started placement training from the second year. They started sharing internship opportunities as per companies' requirements, so that students can apply accordingly and gain internships. I think placements and packages will grow further.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good, with a triangle-shaped building that has 3 to 4 classrooms on each floor and 1-2 labs on each floor. The building has 7 floors. On the ground floor, there are mechanical and workshop labs, and there is also a workshop lab on the 6th floor. The college has a large playground where students can play sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering(Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Strong Placement Opportunities with Supportive Faculty, but Infrastructure needs Improvement.

content.Placements: The highest salary is 12 LPA and the average is 5.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, Paytm, Jio, LTI, and TCS. Approximately 60% get internships from our course. Top roles offered are Software Developer, Data Analyst, Web Developer, Network Engineer, and Testing Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The college library provides access to reference books but does not stock textbooks like Techmax. Students can borrow up to three books at a time from the library. However, students belonging to the SC/ST category are eligible to receive a complete set of books for the semester from the library. Labs are good but no ACs are there which will reduce the lifespan of PCs. No hostel is there in this college. Canteen is there which is decent.

hostel_campus.college_name: Smt. Indira Gandhi College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A good college provides not just academic knowledge but also supports physical and personal growth.
reviews.review_text: Colleges provide a cool and peaceful library environment where students can focus on their studies. The library usually includes a wide collection of academic books, magazines, and online resources, becoming a hub for self-learning and exam preparation.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is small but pretty decent. Group projects teach collaboration, leadership, and compromises, requiring students to communicate. The food quality is just okay and sports are also being conducted. College is supporting the students too.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the good colleges in Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well and good with the library having a Wi-Fi system. We have a canteen with a variety of dishes and labs with new equipment. Some classes with smart board system. The computer department labs with AC system and the latest computers. All classrooms are under camera Surveillance.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good, and fests and all other events are celebrated very well.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, with a triangle-shaped building that has 3 to 4 classrooms on each floor and 1-2 labs on each floor. The building has 7 floors. On the ground floor, there are mechanical and workshop labs, and there is also a workshop lab on the 6th floor. The college has a large playground where students can play sports.

reviews.review_heading: Strong Placement Opportunities with Supportive Faculty, but Infrastructure needs Improvement.
reviews.review_text: The college library provides access to reference books but does not stock textbooks like Techmax. Students can borrow up to three books at a time from the library. However, students belonging to the SC/ST category are eligible to receive a complete set of books for the semester from the library. Labs are good but no ACs are there which will reduce the lifespan of PCs. No hostel is there in this college. Canteen is there which is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good enough to start your career.
reviews.review_text: The college has more than 8 labs and more than 2 workshops for electrical and mechanical students. The canteen is also good in hygiene. Students may come to the canteen and have their own lunch too. The library is also good, but sometimes it is average.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college facilities what they provide under this fee.
reviews.review_text: There are all the necessary facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, stationery, well-organized labs, and classrooms. The canteen is average as it is located in the place where two classrooms are combined, but the food and price they offer are pretty good. The most basic thing is that the campus is very clean and silent; no such bad activities are happening over there.

reviews.review_heading: Very much satisfied with the college
reviews.review_text: Great infrastructure all the tools and machinery for learning are available.2 seminar halls however hostel is not available inside the campus. The main fest of the college is ignite where you can see celebrities also we have tech fest two times in a year.

reviews.review_heading: Very good crowd and staff, decent placements, decent infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college is still developing so every year. There are improvements in the college. The facilities in the college are decent all labs and library have a good wifi. Also there are two seminar halls at ground and first floor there are total seven floor in college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Smt. Indira Gandhi College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are available for each and every lab in the college. The classrooms are big enough. There is no hostel affiliated with the college. But you can stay as paying guests in the nearby apartments. The canteen is decent, and the food served is better than average.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college I know.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good enough for students. We have six floors, and each floor is assigned to a particular engineering branch such as Electrical, IoT, Mechanical, AIDS, and AIML. Each floor has its own washrooms, drinking water, and the best facilities ever.

reviews.review_heading: Less satisfied with the college infrastructure, faculty, placements, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the library for students. The infrastructure is somewhat okay. Only computer branch students have access to the latest labs and PCs. Classrooms are large and clean, and the library is vast with a broad range of reference books. Sports events are held every year.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and opportunities for the industry.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good in our college and we have Wi-Fi, labs, and also a library. Hostel facility was provided and the food served was of good quality both in the hostel and in the canteen of college premises. We are offered average rated food in our canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good institute with great faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, with ample space for classrooms and practical labs. The hostel provides the best food and necessary items, and a canteen is also available. They provide labs and a good library with a large collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: This college was above my expectations.
reviews.review_text: The college has an above average infrastructure for our course. The campus has all the kinds of facilities available including Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, etc. for the students. Hostel facility was also available and given on first come first serve basis. Rooms and food quality were good enough.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Apparel Production Management - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is good for textile engineering. It is the best college of West Bengal for textile technology.

content.Placements: Placements in the Government College of Engineering and Textile Technology are pretty good for textile apparel branch students. Almost all students in this branch are placed through on-campus placements. It provides pretty good internships for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the Government College of Engineering and Textile Technology, Serampore is not so good, but adjustable. Buildings of this college are very old. Labs are just okay. Hostels are available but the capacity is too small.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Textile Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: 2nd best college for textile department.

content.Placements: More than 95% of students from Textile Technology branches got on-campus placement in 2024-25. The highest package given by the companies is 18 LPA. The average package is 7 LPA. Actually, this college has only TT and APM placement. There are few placement opportunities for CSE and IT students.
content.Infrastructure: Our course has good infrastructure but not so well and clean compared to private colleges. No Wi-Fi is available for students. Our college has 4 departments, and labs are available. The library is available, and it's so clean and has a good collection of books. Our college has no hostel for 1st and 2nd-year students, so I have no knowledge about hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Apparel Production Management - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college location, average infrastructure with good teachers.

content.Placements: Placement is very good for APM and TT branches with almost 100% placement, but for IT and CSE, it is worse. Good average government college with fewer feels. Recently, there was a placement in Aditya Birla, Raymond, and many valuable companies for the Textile department.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is not available at the moment for 2nd and 3rd-year students as it has been in preparation for the last 3 years. A little canteen with a good amount of items is there. Classrooms are average. There is a ground in the middle to play sports and there are no medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Apparel Production Management - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Value for money for Textile and apm branches .

content.Placements: The placements in our college is good. 97% placements in textile technology, 87% placements in apm, CSE and it placements are average, I don't know the actual percentage. Top recruiter company are Raymond, Aditya Birla garments, Hcl, Cognizant, Infosys, Tata.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is average and not so good. I didn't find any Wi-Fi in the college. Labs and classrooms are average. But library is well maintained. Library has many books and librarian's behaviour is very good. I don't know about hostel, I am currently living in a nearby PG.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good campus.

content.Placements: There are good placements for TT and APM. For IT and CSE, placements are not up to the mark. Our TPO tries its best to make it good for our future. Campus placements will be better in the near future. Many companies will reach our college. I hope everyone will get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of labs is moderate, like that of average government colleges. Wi-Fi is available in college, but it's not working. Classrooms are in average condition. They are enough for learning. Hostel facilities are available. The canteen is also in average condition. If you want to play any games, you can join this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for textile engineering. It is the best college of West Bengal for textile technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Government College of Engineering and Textile Technology, Serampore is not so good, but adjustable. Buildings of this college are very old. Labs are just okay. Hostels are available but the capacity is too small.

reviews.review_heading: 2nd best college for textile department.
reviews.review_text: Our course has good infrastructure but not so well and clean compared to private colleges. No Wi-Fi is available for students. Our college has 4 departments, and labs are available. The library is available, and it's so clean and has a good collection of books. Our college has no hostel for 1st and 2nd-year students, so I have no knowledge about hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college location, average infrastructure with good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not available at the moment for 2nd and 3rd-year students as it has been in preparation for the last 3 years. A little canteen with a good amount of items is there. Classrooms are average. There is a ground in the middle to play sports and there are no medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money for Textile and apm branches .
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is average and not so good. I didn't find any Wi-Fi in the college. Labs and classrooms are average. But library is well maintained. Library has many books and librarian's behaviour is very good. I don't know about hostel, I am currently living in a nearby PG.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of labs is moderate, like that of average government colleges. Wi-Fi is available in college, but it's not working. Classrooms are in average condition. They are enough for learning. Hostel facilities are available. The canteen is also in average condition. If you want to play any games, you can join this college.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good this year. Overall, it is an average government college in Serampore.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are average in this college with required improvements in laboratories and PCs installed in these labs. Otherwise Wi-Fi, air-conditioners, library and classrooms are all available in our college.  Library is one of the best facility provided in our college with a wide range of books for all departments. They also provide some other facilities such as sports ground, college hostel, and medical facilities. Especially the canteen and sports ground are very good. Several sports a...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers.
reviews.review_text: We don't get any kind of facilities like a hostel, and it's a big problem.

reviews.review_heading: A college for textile industry.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi with 3G speed. Labs are well modified with old machines and also, there are ACs in few labs. Classrooms are cleaned after every month. Hostel facilities are so poor. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is awesome. Medical facilities are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members below average infrastructure and decent placement .
reviews.review_text: College hostel is in the phase of reconstruction. General facilities are only available. Internet connection problems occurs frequently. Classrooms are not kept clean but the college has ample space. Library offers great collection of books to the students to read and refer.

reviews.review_heading: Decent, promising placements every year, good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Being one of the oldest textile colleges, the infrastructure is old but new buildings have been made, and the college also has all the facilities. Labs, classrooms, and Libraries are all well-equipped and furnished. Hostels are situated within the college campus but are only provided for male students.

reviews.review_heading: Best Government engineering college for textile technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructures all around are well manner. There is wi-fi and labs free of cost as it is a government engineering college. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is better. All types of food items are available in our hostel canteen at a cheap value. There is also the availability of medical facilities, sports, and games on our college premises.

reviews.review_heading: Government College of Engineering Textile Technology, Serampore offers good undergraduate programs.
reviews.review_text: The College campus is large enough with a large playground and hostel too. The classrooms are quite large and spacious but not well maintained. The labs are well-equipped with computers and centralized air-conditioning. The library is well-equipped with books. The hostel is not at all well maintained and the food quality is also not good. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are also available and are arranged every year.

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience at this college is not good.
reviews.review_text: There is only one boys' hostel with three stories, and the infrastructure is very bad. Four or five students stay in every room. There are not enough windows in most of the rooms. Another serious problem is ragging in the hostel. Juniors are heavily tortured by seniors. It is the tradition of this hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and an amazing place.
reviews.review_text: Our college has free Wi-Fi, labs, library, and all facilities for students. All types of games are organised. The library is very useful and well cleaned. It is helpful for all students, and it is awesome. I like that.

reviews.review_heading: To sum up, I am very much satisfied with my college faculty, infrastructure, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is being improved day by day. We are having a Wi-Fi engulfed campus. The labs of CSE/ IT are quite adorable. The campus is having a vibe of freedom and knowledge persisting all around. Accompanied by the flowing of the holy river Ganga aside, the college campus will ready draw your attention towards it. Apart from all these, our college is having a world class library, where you can get your enchanted up with new skills and boost your knowledge.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you have a lot possibilities to get a seat for MBA at Arka Jain University. The cut-off scores may be higher for a particular specialisation you select because of stronger demand or smaller class sizes.In summary, achieving a 78th percentile on the CAT does not ensure admission, but it does place you in the competitive area. Applying with strength, performing well in GD & PI, and looking into other options can greatly improve your chances of being accepted into Arka Jain University's MBA programme.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A.( Hons.) in Fashion Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Well-rounded experience with strong placements, supportive faculty, and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is 5-6 LPA, the lowest package is 2-3 Lacs, and about 70%-80% of students in our course secured internships through campus or personal efforts, with roles offered in export houses like designing. Students can also get internships in other states to gain more experience in export.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructure is generally satisfactory, the mess food is decent and hygienic though the variety and taste can sometimes be inconsistent, and the menu is pure vegetarian.
review_content.Faculty: Most of the faculty members are well qualified, with many holding Ph.D. degrees and experience, they are approachable, supportive, and willing to help students beyond class hours. The course curriculum is fairly updated and aligned with industry standards, and semester exams are moderately difficult.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Best college of Jamshedpur.

review_content.Placements: Placements at Arka Jain University are quite good. Around 80 to 85 percent students from my batch got placed especially from CSE, ECE and management streams. The highest package offered is around 10 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA and the average package ranges between 4 LPA and 5 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Byju's, HCL, Infosys and ICICI Bank. 70 percent students also got internship opportunities in reputed organizations which help in gaining real industry exposure. The top roles offered in our course are software engineer, data analyst, sales executive, business development associate and operations manager.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It has decent placements and top-notch infrastructure.

content.Placements: College is very good. 80 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered is 5 LPA. The average package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top companies like Tata Motors, Amazon, etc., hire students. 80 percent of students got internships from our course in companies. Roles like data analyst, junior data scientist, and software developer are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college hostel is good. Facilities and infrastructure are good. It has the best Wi-Fi facility, labs, and good classrooms. It has the best library with a seating area. It is good to study. The hostel food is best compared to other private colleges. Sports and games are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements and faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 70 to 80 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Accenture, and Wipro recruit here. Top roles like Web Developer, Analyst, and Data Scientist are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for my course Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus. Well-equipped labs for practical sessions. It has spacious classrooms with modern teaching aids. It also has a library with a good collection of books and journals. The hostel facilities are generally good with decent accommodation. The mess food is hygienic and varied.

individual_reviews.course: B.A.( Hons.) in Fashion Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Well-rounded experience with strong placements, supportive faculty, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The highest package is 5-6 LPA, the lowest package is 2-3 Lacs, and about 70%-80% of students in our course secured internships through campus or personal efforts, with roles offered in export houses like designing. Students can also get internships in other states to gain more experience in export.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructure is generally satisfactory, the mess food is decent and hygienic though the variety and taste can sometimes be inconsistent, and the menu is pure vegetarian.
content.Faculty: Most of the faculty members are well qualified, with many holding Ph.D. degrees and experience, they are approachable, supportive, and willing to help students beyond class hours. The course curriculum is fairly updated and aligned with industry standards, and semester exams are moderately difficult.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college of Jamshedpur.

content.Placements: Placements at Arka Jain University are quite good. Around 80 to 85 percent students from my batch got placed especially from CSE, ECE and management streams. The highest package offered is around 10 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA and the average package ranges between 4 LPA and 5 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Byju's, HCL, Infosys and ICICI Bank. 70 percent students also got internship opportunities in reputed organizations which help in gaining real industry exposure. The top roles offered in our course are software engineer, data analyst, sales executive, business development associate and operations manager.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (Honours with Research) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, but average faculty support.

content.Placements: 65 to 75 percent of students from our batch got placed through campus recruitment. Placement chances are better for students with strong technical and communication skills. The highest package is around 6 to 7 LPA (for students placed in reputed IT firms). The average package is around 3 to 3.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA (mainly in support or non-core roles).
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good infrastructure for the BCA course. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors making learning more interactive. The computer labs have Wi-Fi, updated systems and necessary software tools to support programming and project work. The library is well-stocked with academic books, journals, and digital resources, which are very helpful for students.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for admission at Arka Jain University?

faqs.answer: Arka Jain University MBA admission is entrance-based. The university shortlists applicants for its MBA programme based on their performance in AJUCET conducted by AJU or any one of the accepted entrance exams. The university accepts the exam scores of various national-level entrance exams, such as CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, etc. Candidates with a valid exam score in any one of these exams can apply for direct admission to the university, subject to the fulfilment of the AJU MBA eligibility criteria. Eligible candidates can apply online by visiting the university's official website. Alternatively, they can visit the university's campus to obtain, fill out and submit the application form.
faqs.question: How do I get admission to MBA at Arka Jain University?

faqs.answer: Communicate directly with the admissions office of Arka Jain University. In addition to providing you with an estimate of the anticipated eligibility requirements and admissions procedure, they may be able to offer you with more recent cut-off information, if that information is available. Scorecard analysis tools—which display percentile ranges of previous year's admissions to various universities—are available for some entrance tests, such as the MAT or CAT. You can get a ballpark idea of the anticipated cut-offs at Arka Jain University by using these tools for college rankings and popularity that are comparable to AJU.The amount of applications, the popularity of the programme, and the general difficulty of the admission exam are some of the variables that can cause cut-offs to change from year to year.Admittance is not guaranteed if one meets the minimum cutoff; interview scores, professional experience, and academic standing may also be taken into account.To improve your chances of acceptance, use the material that is available as a guide, but concentrate on getting well-prepared for the entrance exam and putting together a compelling application.
faqs.question: Where can a candidate find Arka Jain University cut off?

admission_process.title: Arka Jain University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Arka Jain University admissionsare primarily entrance-based followed by counselling. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Arka Jain University is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Arka Jain University Application Process 2026

The mode of application is both online or offline. Candidates can visit the official website to apply online for course admission. However, students can also opt for offline application procedures. The application form for the general and SC/ ST categories is INR 1,000 and INR 500, respectively.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as JEE Mian, CUET, MAT, XAT etc for admission to the BTech, BPharma among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of Arka Jain University cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theArka Jain University feeto confirm their seats at the university.
For more information about Arka Jain University check out the below video:

placement_data.title: Arka Jain University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to the official brochure 2025 released by the University, more than 110 students got multiple offers during Arka Jain University placement 2024. A total of 500 offers were also made during the placement drive 2024. The highest and average package offered in 2024 stood at INR 23 LPA and INR 3.2 LPA , respectively. The placement rate recorded during Arka Jain University placement 2024 was 71.08%.

The University has a dedicated placement cell that facilitates all types of placement-related activities. Meanwhile, an Annual Job Fair was held by the University wherein 3,800 students registered , 700 selections were made and 2,400 interviews conducted. The highest package offered in the Job Fair was INR 8 LPA.

The experienced staff of business librarians provides research training, individual consultations and email reference assistance to help Arka Jain University make the most effective use of library resources.

cafeteria.description: Our cafeteria is an all-you-care-to-eat cafeteria-style facility. It is also a perfect place for student’s hang-out over a cup of coffee after a stretched hour of classes and hours-long presentation, workshop etc. It sometimes becomes an ideal place to complete group assignments or do a presentation rehearsal. It is a strict vegetarian cafeteria.

hostel.description: Arka Jain University provides well furnished separate spacious accommodation for both Girls & Boys. Hostels at Arka Jain University give a unique opportunity for an individual to network with a melange of cultures, passions and emotions. Jain College hostels are strictly vegetarian.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Billiards

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: It has decent placements and top-notch infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college hostel is good. Facilities and infrastructure are good. It has the best Wi-Fi facility, labs, and good classrooms. It has the best library with a seating area. It is good to study. The hostel food is best compared to other private colleges. Sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure for my course Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus. Well-equipped labs for practical sessions. It has spacious classrooms with modern teaching aids. It also has a library with a good collection of books and journals. The hostel facilities are generally good with decent accommodation. The mess food is hygienic and varied.

reviews.review_heading: Well-rounded experience with strong placements, supportive faculty, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is generally satisfactory, the mess food is decent and hygienic though the variety and taste can sometimes be inconsistent, and the menu is pure vegetarian.

reviews.review_heading: Best college of Jamshedpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Arka Jain University is well maintained with modern classrooms, smart boards, well stocked central library, computer labs and dedicated laboratories for practical learning. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled and provides a good environment for academics as well as extracurricular activities. The hostel facilities are also comfortable with spacious rooms, 24/7 security, hygienic food in the mess and proper cleanliness. Sports facilities like a cricket ground, basketball court and g...

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, but average faculty support.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good infrastructure for the BCA course. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors making learning more interactive. The computer labs have Wi-Fi, updated systems and necessary software tools to support programming and project work. The library is well-stocked with academic books, journals, and digital resources, which are very helpful for students.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements, modern infrastructure, and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Arka Jain University provides modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped computers and Science labs, a central library with digital resources, and smart classrooms for effective learning. The campus has good hostel facilities with clean rooms, 24/7 security, and medical support. The mess offers hygienic food with a decent variety, while the canteen provides additional choices. Sports facilities include grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, indoor games, and a gym, en...

reviews.review_heading: Real image of the university.
reviews.review_text: Clean mess, there is a nursing room dedicated, there are 2-3 large grounds for playing, and every block has its own auditorium. The university engages in every sport and encourages students to participate, it even includes taekwondo, badminton, cricket, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with its location. Well, not the location but the road is very bad.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very nice. There are 6 blocks on the campus and it also has library with computers. Every student is allotted their email and Wi-Fi. The coursera app is free while the student registration is active which helps in skill development for students.

reviews.review_heading: The university is cost-effective but lacks in providing placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good for Journalism and Mass Communication.

reviews.review_heading: Best for placements and fests.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like multiple canteens and libraries are available. Non-AC classrooms are there. AC is present only in labs like java and C lab. Wi-Fi is available but it works very slowly. Network connection is the biggest drawback. There is high scope in sports. Food and medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Arka Jain University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but the classrooms don't have air-conditioners. Mostly the weather is humid so they should provide air-conditioners in classrooms. The mess is not good and hygiene is not maintained. Nescafe is also there in the college which you can have.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college provides various facilities like hostels, libraries, various playgrounds, and canteens. The quality of the hostel is very good, clean, and clear, and the food quality in the canteen is also very good. All the medical, sports, and games facilities are giving their best in their role.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides great placements and has great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is excellent, featuring modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library with ample resources. The hostel facilities are comfortable, with clean rooms and decent food in the mess. Medical facilities are accessible, and there are good options for sports and games promoting a balanced lifestyle.

reviews.review_heading: The roads of the campus are very nice.
reviews.review_text: A very nice infrastructure, having good classrooms, Wi-Fi facilities, projectors, and smart classes, was also provided to us on our campus. This campus, being a place of belongingness, helps us to reach our goal, and the development of this campus is just wonderful, I believe.

reviews.review_heading: This college is for rich people.
reviews.review_text: Overall, on the basis of infrastructure, it will get an A grade. Hostel facility is not at all good and is highly not recommended. Bus transportation is also not good. Bus drivers often drive the bus in an alcoholic condition, which leads to accidents. But the college doesn't take any action.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Symbiosis school of economics accepts SET scores for admission to its B.Sc and M.Sc programs. Admission is against qualifying the Symbiosis Entrance Test (SET), Writing Ability Test (WAT) and presonal interaction (PI). Interested candidates who have completed their +2 education with a minimum of 50 percentage aggregate marks and for SC/ST categoiries it is 45 percentage are eligible to apply through the SET exam. The SET exam serves as an essential gateway for aspiring students to secure admission to SSE and other affiliated instutions within the Symbiosis international (Deemed university) network.
faqs.question: Does Symbiosis School of Economics accept SET score?

faqs.answer: A:    Greetings, To get into the BSc programme at Symbiosis School of Economics SET is required.Eligibility: You should have passed your 12th grade or equivalent exam from a recognised board with at least 50% marks (45% for SC/ST). If you're aiming for the Honours with Research option, you need a CGPA of 7.5 or higher by the end of Semester-6.Selection Process:Take the Symbiosis Entrance Test (SET).If you qualify, you'll have a Personal Interaction and Written Ability Test (PI-WAT).For multiple entry options, rules follow the university's Lateral Entry Rules for FYUG Programmes.Best regards,
faqs.question: Is SET required for BSc at Symbiosis School of Economics?

faqs.answer: A:    SET is a national-level entrance exam conducted for admission to various undergraduate courses. SET 2026 will be conducted in the computer-based test mode. The difficulty level of the SET exam is usually easy to moderate. But, a few questions might trick your mind and can be time-consuming.General Knowledge and Analytical and Logical Reasoning are easier than the Quantitative Aptitude section. In 2025, according to the students who appeared for the SET session 1 exam, the SET exam was moderate. The General English section was the easiest of all four sections. The Quantitative Aptitude section was the toughest, and the other two sections were moderate to easy. The overall difficulty level of the SET question paper was moderate. Students who appeared for the SET 2025 session 2 exam said that the overall difficulty level was easy. Again, the General English section was the easiest. In this session, the Analytical and Logical Reasoning section was also easy to moderate. The Quant section was easy to moderate, and the General Knowledge section was difficult.
faqs.question: What is the difficulty level of SET (Symbiosis Entrance Test)?

review_summary.college_name: School of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering-AI&ML in collaboration with IBM - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you have no choice left or don't plan to rely on college, then you can think about this college.

content.Placements: Since I'm still in my second year, no one from my batch has got an internship or placement till now through college, as far as I know, but yes, some are doing internships, including me, but they have got them off-campus. As for seniors, I don't hear much about their placement, although it's true that companies like IBM, TCs, and Samsung are coming to the college, but I think many just get removed in the first round. As far as I have heard from my teachers and other students.
content.Infrastructure: First of all, this college only provides hostels for some medical students. It does not have a hostel for any other schools. As for the infrastructure, I would say it is decent for what you would expect from a tier 3 college. There are six computer labs in the main Newton block. Except for 1 or 2, all the computer labs are decent enough, but I would not say the same for other labs. The library is decent too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is moderate. The study here is average, like all Greater Noida colleges.

content.Placements: Almost 20 percent of students got placements, I think, which is very low compared to other colleges. The highest package is around 12 LPA, I think, and the average package is 4 LPA, which is very low compared to the fees they are charging us for 4 years. Infosys-type companies hire students from our college. I don't even think that even 1 percent of students get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. It has a very old computer lab, and we will not even see it until the 3rd or 4th semester. It doesn't have a hostel for B.Tech students, and it only has a hostel for medical students, which means they will give us a hostel outside the campus, which is very bad. I am currently living in it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering-AI&ML in collaboration with IBM - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My university fee is lower but they have good faculty members.

content.Placements: In my course, average 60 to 70% of students are placed. The highest package ranges from 19 LPA to 20 LPA. The minimum package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, HCL, Infosys, Birlasoft, Samsung, Google, and Capgemini. 75% of students got internships. Top role offered in CSE is AI data science cybersecurity.
content.Infrastructure: University has good labs. Classrooms are good. There is a library with full area of Wi-Fi coverage. We have high standard infrastructure. For B.Tech students, they have no hostel on campus. Hostels are available only MBBS students on campus. We have good canteen and medical facilities.

admission_process.title: School of Engineering and Technology, Noida International University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: School of Engineering and Technology, Noida International University admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for certain entrance exams to take admission. hostel_campus.college_name: School of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: If you have no choice left or don't plan to rely on college, then you can think about this college.
reviews.review_text: First of all, this college only provides hostels for some medical students. It does not have a hostel for any other schools. As for the infrastructure, I would say it is decent for what you would expect from a tier 3 college. There are six computer labs in the main Newton block. Except for 1 or 2, all the computer labs are decent enough, but I would not say the same for other labs. The library is decent too.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is moderate. The study here is average, like all Greater Noida colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. It has a very old computer lab, and we will not even see it until the 3rd or 4th semester. It doesn't have a hostel for B.Tech students, and it only has a hostel for medical students, which means they will give us a hostel outside the campus, which is very bad. I am currently living in it.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best universities for Computer Science, and you feel satisfied with facilities.
reviews.review_text: Noida International University is like its name, its infrastructure is great. You have to visit at one time, you love the environment of campus. There is NIMS Hospital, which is tied up with Niu. There are 500 patients per day. Sports department has high facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Not really satisfied, but it's good.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, average classrooms, and toilets. Labs are in good condition, and we have an average library. I am not in their hostel, but my friends say it is not well maintained, with average-quality food, toilets, and rooms provided.

reviews.review_heading: My university fee is lower but they have good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: University has good labs. Classrooms are good. There is a library with full area of Wi-Fi coverage. We have high standard infrastructure. For B.Tech students, they have no hostel on campus. Hostels are available only MBBS students on campus. We have good canteen and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure but they should work on management staff. Placements are decent.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is outstanding, like foreign colleges. Wi-Fi is available for every student. Free medical facilities are available to students. Hostel is only available for MBBS students, and now they are constructed for every course student.

reviews.review_heading: It has developed a lot and still developing over time.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good on the campus. Not all classes are air-conditioned but many are air-conditioned. Labs and library facilities are good enough. But a negative point is that there is no good auditorium on the campus. Wi-Fi and medical facilities are also provided. However, the doctors are not always available. There is no hostel on campus but it is provided privately which is quite far, i.e., about 10-12 kilometers away from campus. Buses are provided for it. Sports, games, and ot...

reviews.review_heading: Nice college for enjoying with study.
reviews.review_text: In our course, NIU provides good facilities. There are 6 computer labs in our department. Each lab has 40 computers. Labs and classrooms are fully Wi-Fi enabled. At NIU, there is no hostel for our department. Private hostels like Annapurna and Nalanda collaborate with the university.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the management of the classes.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is very good, There are many labs. It has many facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, and some air-conditioned classes. The hostel also has good facilities like a canteen, medical, sports, games, gym, etc. In facilities our university is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities, well infrastructure, good placement, and friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good and friendly. The department is also very good. The library is very well-maintained and has lots of things to study, both online and offline. The medical facilities are top-class, well-conditioned, neat, and clean, with a friendly environment.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is worth the money paid.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent, good, and looks presentable. The lush green campus is one of the beauties of the college. It has big monumental buildings which provide the presence of a kingdom as a whole. The infrastructure of the B.Tech course is decent and sufficient for any student.

reviews.review_heading: Noida International University best or not.
reviews.review_text: The campus of the college is very magnificent and beautiful. The infrastructure is good and has enough facilities for all students. The campus is divided into different blocks for different courses like IT, business blocks, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is good but the placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but the hostel is very bad. There is Wi-Fi here, but it doesn't work. There is a lot of network problems. There is a lot of transport problems in this area. The hostel is so bad. The food in the hostel is very bad.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is beautiful and there are 12 schools that have various courses. There are Wi-Fi facilities in the whole campus. The labs are good, and the class rooms are good but not air conditioning. The library is big and has so many books in it but not air conditioning. The hostel is for medical students and the canteen and medical facilities are good. Free consultancy is free for college students. There are separate departments for sports. There are so many festivals of sports and other...

reviews.review_heading: I think every college is good till you focus on your study.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really awesome. Labs are well maintained. Everything is properly cleaned. There is no issue in infrastructure and maintenance. Even grasses are well maintained every week. You will not see anything messed up here on campus, as well as classes. There are some canteens that provide the best foods that you will really enjoy at a reasonable price.

admission_process.title: IMU - IMU Kolkata Indian Maritime University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: IMU Kolkataadmissionoffers UG and PG courses. The university also offers doctorate-level courses besides the UG and PG courses. To get admitted to IMU, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The university offers five courses in various streams such as Science, Engineering, Management, etc. The application processatIMU Kolkataisconducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutIMU Kolkatacourse admission2025.

IMU Kolakata courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection forIMU Kolkata courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
MS-By Research

hostel_campus.college_name: IMU Kolkata Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
The hostel has a multi-level formation. On the first level - the wings are divided into 10 Sadans (houses). These "Sadans" are named after famous scientists - Bose, Diesel, Edison, Faraday, Froude, Marconi, Newton, Parson, Raman, Rankin. On the second level- the hostels are further divided into the junior hostel, senior hostel for final year students and east & west wings for 2nd & 3rd-year students.
 
The girls' hostel is a welcome addition to the existing infrastructure of the college. Sonali Banerjee - the first woman marine engineer of Asia - who first occupied this hostel in 1995. The hostel is adjacent to the officer's quarters and is equipped with various amenities.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Hockey, VolleyBall Court

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for marine engineering with a high placement rate.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the Indian Maritime University Kolkata campus is quite good, covering 33 acres of land. The infrastructure of the new academic building is very good. All classes are fully air-conditioned, and the labs have various equipment. Our campus has Asia's largest marine workshop.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges that offers a degree in marine engineering and best placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an outstanding academic building and fully centralized and air-conditioned. But in hostels Wi-Fi is not available. The menu of food is alright but taste is okay, not great. There are no hygiene issues. There are supportive seniors and great atmosphere for sports and extracurricular activities. We have the largest marine workshop in Southeast Asian, and the labs are great.

reviews.review_heading: College is creating legacies.
reviews.review_text: Express Wi-Fi is available all over campus. The library is open all day except Sunday. It has Asia's largest marine workshop with engines namely Yanmar and Allen. It has air-conditioned classrooms with projector and simulators. Lift facilities are available all over the campus. It is filled with greenery and nature all around. Hostels are also very good with a cafeteria and canteen. The best part is the food which we get from a mess.

reviews.review_heading: The best marine institute IMU-KC.
reviews.review_text: College is fully nature-friendly with residential-type courses. Smart labs and library for the students to enhance tier expertise. Simulator labs and VR labs are also top-notch. The mess menu and quality of food slightly coincide with that of NDA. Basketball courts, volleyball courts, badminton courts, football, hockey, and many sports are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It's a hard job, but if you get used to it, you will make a good living out of it.
reviews.review_text: There are air-conditioned classrooms with projectors and Wi-Fi facilities in each of them. There's a separate library where Cadets can go study on their own before the exams. There are mess facilities in each of the hostels. The quality of the food is decent. Almost every sport from football to table tennis is being played on the campus. There is a separate medical facility inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A place to start your marine career. Very good placement ratio.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have AC and projectors. Wi-Fi is available in the academic complex and some hostel complexes. The library is available with a wide range of books (almost all genres of books are present). Hostels are in a good state, food quality is the same as the other hostels have. Canteen is available in the academic block and even in the hostel premises. Gymnasium and swimming pool are present, and almost all sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: A well-structured marine engineering course with practical enhancement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course or department is very much. There is well-organised Wi-Fi in classrooms. We have different labs for different subjects. The library is available The quality of the hostel is average. The food quality is above average. There are medical facilities inside the campus Many sports are there like football, basketball, hockey, cricket, volleyball, and many more.

reviews.review_heading: IMUKC - The DMET legacy, where the future seafarers are trained.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not so big but not so small as well. The college is equipped with basic facilities for sea training. Sports facilities are available; hostel and mess facilities are also available. Apart from that, the college encourages cadets to take part in various other activities like sports, technical paper writing, co-curricular activities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Just search for the DMET Kolkata and you will know everything about this great college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available with a wide range of features. Sports and games have different levels here. Our college provides us with various opportunities to play. There is a sponsor team to go on to other colleges to participate. There is no comparison in other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Bridging dreams and reality: IMU Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: This is a residential course, so you have to stay in the hostel provided by the college. There are laboratories, libraries, and a mess on the ground floor of the hostel. There's a ground where you can play football, hockey, and cricket. There's a basketball court, badminton court, gym, and a huge auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: Course is hard but plays off well.
reviews.review_text: You have the best workshop and Wi-Fi, and the labs are good. Hostels are okay, not the best, but they are still making new ones. The food is okay; you can select your food through the mess member elected by your batchmates. Faculty members are very helpful, even after college. There is an Olympic-size swimming pool and an instructor.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of placements and discipline in college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The IMU Kolkata campus is a central university college, so it has its own good infrastructure. The IMU Kolkata campus has a football ground, basketball court, badminton court, volleyball court, etc. Medical facilities are good. The library has good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for marine engineering.
reviews.review_text: The campus is expanded to 33 acres. The classrooms and library are air-conditioned. Hostels are divided for different-year Cadets, which is well maintained and disciplined. Mess is totally hygienic and provide different seasonal vegetables and fruits.

reviews.review_heading: Best return on investment college - IMU KC, best placement records, amazing campus life.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are decent according to government colleges. In 4 th year you get a single room. The college administration building is fully air-conditioned and has all sorts of smart facilities. There are proper facilities for electricity and water 24/7. Different courts are the their for different sports like basketball, volleyball, badminton, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college placements and the biggest fest.
reviews.review_text: The full campus has Wi-Fi facilities, and the academic buildings are centrally air-conditioned. The college has a large-sized ground and many sports facilities. There is also a kindergarten facility, and games like hockey, football, Kabaddi, cricket, basketball, volleyball, and badminton are available. The hostel is also clean and hygienic.

data.description: It is good, although you shouldn't expect much from any mess of any college. The quality of food is good on average and there are mess members from each batch who decide their menu for the whole month with the consultations of other cadets.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Priyadarshini College of Engineering:

college_info.intro:
Priyadarshini College of Engineering offers a wide range of courses at the UG and doctoral levels through its various departments, including the Department of Civil Engineering, the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, and the Department of Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, among others.
At the UG level, Priyadarshini College of Engineering offers the BTech and BE programmes in various branches such as Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics & Electronics Engineering Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering.
The BTech programme offered by the college is highly popular due to its promising career prospects. Priyadarshini College of Engineering follows an industry-aligned curriculum to help students gain practical knowledge with deep digital insights. The college has also established multiple partnerships to regularly organise industry-driven training and certification programmes, internship opportunities, and industry visits for students.
Below mentioned are the popular Priyadarshini College of Engineering courses, along with fees and eligibility:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The teaching environment and placement opportunities are absolutely bad.

review_content.Placements: Placement on our campus was not very good. The placed students were not satisfied with their roles and salaries. Placement offers were slightly different from the main branch of Priyadarshini in Nagpur. I did not know the recent placement packages, but previously, the highest package was about 7 LPA, and the average was 2 LPA. Internships were not provided on campus, and students had to find their own. The top roles offered were office attendant and sales jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not very developed. Only a few necessary facilities were available. Classrooms were very old, and the lab equipment was not stocked. Classrooms were shared with other branches if more students attended lectures. Library space was available, but not very active. The canteen was available, but food items were limited. The sports ground was very large, but indoor sports equipment was not available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Decent academy support with a good campus, but needs more practical exposure.

review_content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students from the BE in mechanical engineering were placed. The highest package offered was around 6 LPA, the lowest around 2 LPA, and the average was about 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters included NGOs, media houses, and educational firms. Around 50% of students got internships in companies like Teach for India, Times Group, and local startups. Common roles included content writers, research assistants, and HR trainees.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities for our department, including smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and well-equipped computer labs. The library is quiet and stocked with useful study material. Hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The food in the mess is average, while the canteen offers a better variety. Medical help is available on campus with a health center. Sports facilities, such as a playground and indoor games, are provided to encourage student recreation. Overall, the infrastructure is decent and supports both academics and student life well.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Priyadarshini College of Engineering as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Priyadarshini College of Engineering is a reputed institute for BTech, ME/ MTech. Students can opt for these programmes to pursue their career in Engineering. The college has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programmes. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Priyadarshini College of Engineering has a rating of 4 based on reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.5 on campus life, 3.6 on placements, 4 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Priyadarshini College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering (Electronics and Power) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of a first-year student in Priyadarshini College of Engineering, Nagpur.

content.Placements: Placements for core branches are decent but competitive. About 60-70 percent of students in my course got placed, often in IT companies or mixed roles. The highest package offered is 7 LPA, and the average package offered ranges from 3.5 to 4 LPA. Major recruiting companies include L&T, Triveni Turbine, and mass recruiters like TCS and Wipro. Internship culture is growing. Around 50 percent of the batch completed internships in industrial plants in the MIDC and public sector undertakings. The most common roles offered are graduate engineer trainee (GET) and junior analyst.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My CSE batch is not a good fit for this 2025 batch to get easily placed.

content.Placements: Placement ratio in our branch is conservatively odd because only a few students get placed. As I know, the campus placements are very low because of continuous layoffs and recession in my batch. Only a small number of students got placed in some small startups, small companies, or organisations such as ITnetworkz, Techout Solution, and Qspiders. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top roles offered are Java developer, frontend developer, and consultant.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is decent because the number of classrooms, labs, and workshops is available. Some facilities, such as Wi-Fi, food availability in the canteen, and sports grounds, are limited. Classrooms are separate for different departments accordingly, but the seminar hall is just one where all events take place.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The teaching environment and placement opportunities are absolutely bad.

content.Placements: Placement on our campus was not very good. The placed students were not satisfied with their roles and salaries. Placement offers were slightly different from the main branch of Priyadarshini in Nagpur. I did not know the recent placement packages, but previously, the highest package was about 7 LPA, and the average was 2 LPA. Internships were not provided on campus, and students had to find their own. The top roles offered were office attendant and sales jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not very developed. Only a few necessary facilities were available. Classrooms were very old, and the lab equipment was not stocked. Classrooms were shared with other branches if more students attended lectures. Library space was available, but not very active. The canteen was available, but food items were limited. The sports ground was very large, but indoor sports equipment was not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Decent academy support with a good campus, but needs more practical exposure.

content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students from the BE in mechanical engineering were placed. The highest package offered was around 6 LPA, the lowest around 2 LPA, and the average was about 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters included NGOs, media houses, and educational firms. Around 50% of students got internships in companies like Teach for India, Times Group, and local startups. Common roles included content writers, research assistants, and HR trainees.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good facilities for our department, including smart classrooms, fast Wi-Fi, and well-equipped computer labs. The library is quiet and stocked with useful study material. Hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The food in the mess is average, while the canteen offers a better variety. Medical help is available on campus with a health center. Sports facilities, such as a playground and indoor games, are provided to encourage student recreation. Overall, the infrastructure is decent and supports both academics and student life well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college and infrastructure.

content.Placements: 100% of the students are placed in this college. Highest package is Rs. 2,00,000 LPA, and lowest is Rs. 1,00,000 LPA. 95% of students are placed in this college with the top-notch companies. In our course, they offer internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are also good and infrastructure is also available for us and this id also helpful to maintain more discipline and manners in this college. They provide classrooms, Wi-Fi and library to achieve the best dreams. It has enjoyable atmosphere for creativity and has AC.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure.
