reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, helpful faculty members, and strong placement support.
reviews.review_text: The department offers excellent infrastructure with high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, modern labs equipped with the latest tools, and a well-stocked central library with digital resources. Classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned, designed to enhance interactive learning. Hostel facilities are clean and comfortable, with 24X7 electricity, Wi-Fi, and water supply. Rooms are either single or shared, and regular maintenance ensures a hygienic environment. Mess food is decent, with a rotating m...

reviews.review_heading: It is an absolutely good place that gives us knowledge and memories.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure. It has good classrooms, Wi-Fi connectivity, computer labs, and a library with a lot of books. The college has a digital classroom. It has a good hostel. There is not much good mess service. The college provides extra sports.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of course and the hostel are very good. I like to spend time and I like it much more. The Wi-Fi speed of my college is very good. Labs are in good condition with computers. Classrooms are well-furnished. The library is big and there are many books to read.

reviews.review_heading: A very good faculty and labs.
reviews.review_text: Our department is very clean, and the labs are well maintained. All the PCs are working very nicely. Our hostel provides the best facilities, and the quality of the mess food is awesome and delicious in taste. Our canteen is also very hygienic, and the medical facility is also really good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college and its facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in the college are good. The overall campus area is also good. Internet facilities are provided everywhere on the whole college campus. Hostel facilities provided are moderate. Medical facilities and sports are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Anyone who wants a good engineering college, have a look here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in every corner of the campus. There are fully furnished and clean labs in each department. It has a separate 2-storey building for the library, and you can find books of any educational background. The college does not have its own hostel. However, you will find the best hostels, rooms, mess, cafes, and medical facilities within walking distance. The canteen serves the best food of quality, hygiene, and quantity.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure, quality education, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The ECE department offers top facilities with Wi Fi projectors in classrooms and labs with updated systems. The library is well stocked. Hostels are comfortable. The food quality in the canteen is good. Sports facilities are excellent. A medical center ensures care creating a great learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: It has a growing headquarters and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have almost all the facilities in our department like a smart board, good computers, new technology, infrastructure, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Hostels are also good with good facilities, good food and room.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied, good placements and college campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: In every department, there is a classroom, Wi-Fi is available, and labs are available to conduct practical sessions. Some departments also have their own libraries. The college library is available to all students. The quality of the hostel is good, with separate beds for each student, and three students sharing a room. The canteen is good, and sports facilities are available.

college_info.intro:
NEHU Shillong popular programmes are MSc and MBA. MBA is provided in specialisations such as Agri-Business Management, Service Management, Tourism and Travel Management, and others. MBA students can work in the Media Sector, Retail and Corporate Sectors, Banking and Financial Institutions, and others. MBA students are placed in top companies such as Cognizant, Capgemini, and others.
NEHU Shillong MSc students can become Research Scientists, Engineers, Data Analysts, Science Writers, Teachers or Professors, and others. Overall, NEHU Shillong is one of the best colleges in India.

faqs.question: How are the placements at NEHU Shillong?

faqs.answer: A:    After completing MBA from NEHU Shillong candidates can apply for job in various industries such as banking, FMCG, and automobiles. Jobs in sales and marketing, finance, human resources, IT & systems, etc. Candidates can join any of the fields according to their preference.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NEHU Shillong offers UG, PG, and other courses. These courses are provided across Law, Management, Computer Applications, and various other streams. At the UG level, NEHU University offers BSc and other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MBA, MA, MSc, and other courses to students. MA is provided in 15 specialisations such as Anthropology, Lifelong Learning and Extension, English, Geography, Journalism and Mass Communication, Khasi, and others.

faqs.answer: A:    At the postgraduate level, NEHU Shillong offers two-year MA courses to students. MA is offered in various specialisations and one of the specialisation is Geography. The fee for M.A. is INR 3,360. The basic eligibility criteria to apply for the M.A. in Geography is Graduation with a minimum of 45 percent to 55 percent aggregate and the accepted entrance exam is CUET-PG. reviews_list.review_title: North Eastern Hill University Review

review_content.Placements: Percentage of students placed was not that high, but as placements were conducted through CUET, so yes. No package since the university doesn’t provide them. No companies come because there are hardly any placement opportunities. Companies coming to the college is a once in a blue moon thing. Internships are done personally by the students, as in the law department. No roles as such, it is overrated.
review_content.Infrastructure: Buildings are of old architecture and no modern amenities are available. The buildings are weak and seepage is bad. Toilets are not up to the mark with no water most of the time. Classrooms are not in good condition. On rainy days, we suffer leakage from the terrace. Hostel experience is below average with the same problems. Food quality is bad, but the rooms are big enough.

review_summary.college_name: NEHU Shillong Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of my college.

content.Placements: The placements are quite okay. Unlike other colleges, in the past, various companies like Google, some BPOs, and many companies came from time to time to recruit students. This puts the college at a high rank, and as a result, the college recruits only qualified students. I could quote quite a number of students who got a job before completing their courses. But I still feel that this could be better so that more students have a future through this institute.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are great. It is situated near the college. There are two buildings with separate boys and girls. Some rooms are shared, and some single rooms are also available here. Mess food is also great. It costs a total of around Rs. 8000 per month. PG's are also available around the college, which cost around Rs. 4000 per month.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of St. Anthony's College, Shillong.

content.Placements: Nothing comes directly from the college. Everything depends on the student to manage on their own. In a way, this is good, as it helps students prepare themselves for job searches later and equips them with knowledge on how to proceed. Big companies like Amazon, InfoEdge, Paytm, etc., visited the campus with great packages, with the highest being 15 LPA this year. Most of the job descriptions were for the role of SDE, which included FTE plus an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Postgraduate students were given single rooms. They were no other options, for a monthly rental of nearly Rs. 2000. Two-seater rooms were Rs. 1500, three-seater rooms Rs. 1000, and dorms Rs. 500. Food costs were nearly Rs. 50 per day.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Very good atmosphere at college.

content.Placements: The students can become eligible for campus placements from the third semester. The companies visited here are Times of India, BNY Mellon, Swiggy, ABFRL. The highest package offered by the companies is 10 LPA and the minimum is 5 LPA. Profiles offered are Management Trainee, HR Executive, Campus Ambassador. The percentage of students getting placement is 90%. My plan is to get a job as a Business Analyst at the associate level in the Big 4 consulting firms.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi. Rooms are average in condition with one balcony. The rooms are shared with 3 students per room. Meal quality is average sometimes good, sometimes bad. Registration process for hostel is easy, you will know when you visit the campus. Hostel fee: INR 5000 per year.

admission_overview.college_name: NEHU Shillong Course Admissions 2025: CUET, Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: NEHU Shillong Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: North-Eastern Hill University admissionseason generally begins in May every year. The modes ofNorth-Eastern Hill Universitycourse admissions are online. Admission to various courses is based on merit and entrance exam scores. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, B.Arch, BA and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MSc, MCom, MA, and various other courses to students. The university also provides PhD courses to students. The NEHU accepts exams like CUET, JEE Mains, MAT, NATA, GATE, etc. for admission.
NEHU Shillong Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection

NEHU admissions generally begin in May every year. Admission to most of the courses at the university is entrance exam/merit-based. Candidates, however, for all courses are required to meet minimum eligibility criteria to get shortlisted for any and every course offered by NEHU. Check below popular NEHU courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

The fee structure for different courses at the NEHU varies with the specialisation and the affiliated college with which they are available. NEHU Shillong offers seat reservations to candidates belonging to various categories i.e., open category, SC/ST, PwD, etc. The following table mentions all the popularNEHU coursesalong with their total tuition fee and seat intake:

NEHU Shillong admissionis merit and entrance-based. The University offers more than various degree programmes in various fields of Engineering, Management, Commerce, Sciences, Arts, etc. The application process for NEHU Shillong is completely online. The admission process for these courses is highlighted below:
Application Process:
The mode of application at NEHU is online. Candidates must register online and then fill the online application form.
Selection rounds:

Candidates will be selected based on the marks secured in the following entrance examCUET/JEE Main/CAT/CMAT, etc. followed by a GD and PI round conducted by the University and then wait for the release of their results
Admission confirmation:
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the average package of CSE at North Eastern Hill University Shillong?
faqs.answer: The University has not released the branch-wise placement data. However, the collective the highest salary has been released. The overall the highest package for 2024 stood at INR 10.80 LPA. Further, the highest package was offered to BTech IT students of the School of Technology, NEHU Shillong. Earlier, the highest package offered to the 2023 batch was INR 4.20 LPA and for 2022, it stood at INR 4.10 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure at NEHU Shillong for M.A. in Geography?
faqs.answer: At the postgraduate level, NEHU Shillong offers two-year MA courses to students. MA is offered in various specialisations and one of the specialisation is Geography. The fee for M.A. is INR 3,360. The basic eligibility criteria to apply for the M.A. in Geography is Graduation with a minimum of 45 percent to 55 percent aggregate and the accepted entrance exam is CUET-PG. Central University Entrance Test or CUET PG is an all-India level entrance examination that is being introduced for admission to postgraduate programmes in various central and participating universities.

faqs.question: What are the fees at NEHU Shillong?
faqs.answer: NEHU Shillong offers courses at the UG and PG levels in full-time mode for durations varying from 2 years to 5 years. Admission to the respective courses is offered on the basis of merit and entrance. The University offers respective courses at the total tuition fees ranging from INR 1.68 K to INR 2.07 Lakh.

description: NEHU Shillong cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NEHU Shillong JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

NEHU Shillong JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 223308, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the NEHU Shillong B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 173345 and 606929 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 173345 and 223308, B.Tech. in Information Technology and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NEHU Shillong. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NEHU Shillong to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NEHU Shillong. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

NEHU Shillong cutoff 2023 for the PG Medical courses including MD and MS is based on NEET PG scores, followed by NEET PG Counselling. Candidates with a valid NEET PG cutoff are called for further counselling rounds. NEET PG Counselling 2023 was concluded after Round 3 Seat Allotment results. As per NEET cutoff 2023, NEHU Shillong MD in Radio Diagnosis closed at 508 for Round 1 Seat Allotment for the General category All India candidates.

NEHU Shillong offers MD/ MS Medical courses based on NEET PG scores, followed by round-wise counselling. As per the last round closing ranks for NEHU Shillong NEET PG cutoff 2023, MD in Radiodiagnosis closed at 732 after Round 3. In 2022, MD in Radiodiagnosis closed at 597. On comparing and analysing the cutoff trend for the three years it can be concluded that the university has witnessed a huge fluctuating trend for MD in Radiodiagnosis. NEHU Shillong offers DM in Cardiology at the super speciality level. The university accepts NEET SS scores followed by NEET SS Counselling for admission to the said course. NEHU Shillong cutoff for DM in Cardiology closed at 1197 after Round 1 Seat Allotment results for General category All India candidates. As per the last round closing ranks for NEHU Shillong cutoff 2023, DM in Cardiology stood at 1727 after Round 3 Seat Allotment results for the General category All India candidates. Tabulated below is the round-wise closing rank for NEHU Shillong cutoff 2023 based on NEET SS scores:

highlights.description: NEHU Shillong is one of the India’s top ranked institutes. It is considered as a leading institute by national ranking bodies. As per NIRF 2025, the institute has been ranked #151-200 under the University category. The institute is well known for its excellent academic offerings and top faculty. Candidates can go through the following to know more details around NEHU Shillong rankings.

nirf.description:
Over the years, NEHU Shillong has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the NEHU Shillong's rankings in 'University' category have displayed a decreasing trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2025, NEHU Shillong fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Explore the NEHU Shillong latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

outlook.description:
Based on the rankings from Outlook, NEHU Shillong outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook ranking system. In the 'Central Universities' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, NEHU Shillong's rank is #6, the same as last year's rank in the 'Central Universities' category by the Outlook ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

qs_world.description:
NEHU Shillong has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, NEHU Shillong fell 220 ranks to #801 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, NEHU Shillong fell 82 ranks to #254 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: NEHU Shillong Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The North-Eastern Hill University also provides hostel facility for the International students (which includes male and female both) with 24 rooms and with a intake capacity of 24 with all the facility.
facilities: North Eastern Hill University (NEHU) is located in Shillong, Meghalaya. The nearest airport is Shillong Airport (also known as Umroi Airport), located about 30 kilometres from the university. From the airport, one can book a taxi or use public transport to reach the university.
The nearest major railway station is Guwahati Railway Station in Assam, which is well-connected to major cities in India. From Guwahati, one can take a taxi or a bus to Shillong, and then to NEHU.

library.description:
The North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) Library, which started with a collection of 600 books in 1973, is now a premier university library of the North-Eastern Region of India with a collection of over 2.9 lakh volumes of books and bound periodicals supplemented by the enormous information resources now available through the e-ShodhSindhu Consortium for Higher Education Resources and the links to global information resources and services provided on its webpage.
The NEHU Central Library is now equipped with high-end computers and other electronic and audio-visual equipment to provide seamless in-house and online services.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Hockey, Boxing, Judo, Volleyball Court, Weight lifting, Athletics, Table Tennis

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Advanced Computing Lab, Basic Computing Lab, Data Structure Lab, Software Engineering Lab, Computer Networks Lab, Database Lab, VLSI Designing Lab., Microwave Lab, Embedded System Lab, Medical Image Processing Lab, Bio - Nanotechnology Lab, Microprocessor Lab, Fluid Mechanics Lab, Fuel &  Combustion Lab, Solar Thermal Lab, Thermal Lab, IC Energy Lab.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are great. It is situated near the college. There are two buildings with separate boys and girls. Some rooms are shared, and some single rooms are also available here. Mess food is also great. It costs a total of around Rs. 8000 per month. PG's are also available around the college, which cost around Rs. 4000 per month.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review of St. Anthony's College, Shillong.
reviews.review_text: Postgraduate students were given single rooms. They were no other options, for a monthly rental of nearly Rs. 2000. Two-seater rooms were Rs. 1500, three-seater rooms Rs. 1000, and dorms Rs. 500. Food costs were nearly Rs. 50 per day.

reviews.review_heading: North Eastern Hill University Review
reviews.review_text: Buildings are of old architecture and no modern amenities are available. The buildings are weak and seepage is bad. Toilets are not up to the mark with no water most of the time. Classrooms are not in good condition. On rainy days, we suffer leakage from the terrace. Hostel experience is below average with the same problems. Food quality is bad, but the rooms are big enough.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review of St. Anthony's College, Shillong.
reviews.review_text: Postgraduate students were given single rooms. They were no other options, for a monthly rental of nearly Rs. 2000. Two-seater rooms were Rs. 1500, three-seater rooms Rs. 1000, and dorms Rs. 500. Food costs were nearly Rs. 50 per day.

reviews.review_heading: Very good atmosphere at college.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi. Rooms are average in condition with one balcony. The rooms are shared with 3 students per room. Meal quality is average sometimes good, sometimes bad. Registration process for hostel is easy, you will know when you visit the campus. Hostel fee: INR 5000 per year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 13 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Washrooms are very hygienic and dirty. Security arrangements are very bad and anyone can enter the campus. Classrooms and labs are average. Limited resources in the library. The quality of food available in the canteen is acceptable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 19 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is full of diversity with people coming from different states.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are the best. It has a mini football ground, a badminton court, a gym, and a volleyball and basketball court. It also has a table tennis room, foosball, snooker, and carrom board. The hostel seats are limited to around 200+ students. Regarding the mess, it’s not that good to be frank.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best University for M.Teach. In Information Technology Course.
reviews.review_text: The amenities at our college are excellent. Our infrastructure has received an A+ NAAC grade. The classrooms and laboratories are kept in good condition. Every classroom is equipped with a teaching device. Each lab possesses quality laptops. Food in the canteen is enjoyable. The hotels are well-kept and in excellent condition. Additional, there are healthcare and terrestrial services.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 19 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Computer labs are very highly expensive.
reviews.review_text: Triple-sharing rooms with and without AC are available, 12 rooms per floor, providing a study table, an almirah, and all the basic things. Laundry is available and gives clothes after 3 days, house cleaning service has been topped for inside the room, no cleaning in the room until further notice, which is not good at all. Multiple complaints have been made to the concerned authorities, but still, it's been over a month now, and there's been no improvement at all.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 19 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All the faculty members are experts in their fields and motivate students.
reviews.review_text: In hostel, there is one flat where six students live. One flat has three rooms. Each room has 2 students, they provide one table, one chair, and one almirah. There is a common late batch among six students. There is a separate hostel for juniors. Meal is excluded from hostel, we have to pay for a meal every day. Accommodation charges for hostel are Rs. 65,000 per year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 19 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's very affordable even for students who are financially weak.
reviews.review_text: Hostel was cheaper than any other colleges, and it had a separate hostel for boys and girls. But the hostel was not too good, it was normal, and it provided normal facilities. Canteen was good. It provided better meals, like homemade food according to routine or a menu. You had to register for the hostel in advance, and then they would allocate the hostel and room. Hostel fee was Rs. 12,000 and Rs. 18,000 for the mess. If you wanted better facilities, then you would choose PG.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 15 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Management, I love the way the college manages certain things.
reviews.review_text: There exist certain social welfare clubs such as NCC, NSS, Anthony Youth Club, and many more. These clubs do not stand just for the betterment of the college itself, however, it has impacted the whole town of Shillong. Centers such as hospitals, orphanages, etc. They are being provided with necessities such as food, clothing, and many more. Moreover, things such as blood donation are being done.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 15 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The faculty is nice, and the teaching staff is supportive and well trained.
reviews.review_text: There were many clubs in the college that we could join and participate in. The clubs host different programs, activities, events, and competitions frequently. There were also NCCs and NSSs, which the students can join for their personal growth and to serve the nation and society. There was also a college week every year in which all the clubs came together to host a big week.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 15 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college provides quality education at an affordable price. All the teachers are good.
reviews.review_text: There were various events organised in our college. The most awaited of all was the college week held in the month of February every year. There were sports, cultural day, jam session, cosplay, and various competitions. There were also other activities, such as field trips according to departments, skill development programs, and many other learning activities. The college library was full of books and resources. It provides a variety of subject specific books, and apart from it, there were ever...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by St. Anthony's College, ShillongReviewed on 15 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The teaching staff are really good at teaching and they give their best to help the students.
reviews.review_text: We have many clubs in our college, so it was up to your interest what you want to choose. We have NCC, dance and culture club, etc. In the beginning of our college, we had many programs like fresher and meet up, and after that we even had many books in our library. There were more than 5000 books, and you can borrow them for 1 week with the help of our college ID, and you can even access some online links and read all the books that you want for free.

college_info.intro: OP Jindal University Raigarh popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech students are placed in top companies such as Axis Securities, Cognizant, Asian Paints, and others. OP Jindal University Raigarh BTech and MBA students are currently working as Managers, Team Leaders, and others. After completing their education, students can even go for MTech or PhD courses. OP Jindal University Raigarh BTech students are taught technical, communication, and various other skills. Below mentioned are some of the OP Jindal University Raigarh courses and their respective eligibility and fees:

placements.overview:
The mode of OP Jindal University course admissions is online. Admission to various courses is based on merit and entrance exam scores. The accepted entrance exams are JEE Main, CG PET, and others. Candidates willing to get admission must take part in the OP Jindal University admission process before the last date of application. Follow the OP Jindal University application process mentioned below:

Step 1: Visit the official website of OP Jindal University which is www.opju.ac.in/.

Step 3: Pay the application fee.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: OP Jindal University Raigarh offers PG, UG, diploma, and PhD programmes to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Engineering, and various other streams. At the UG level, the university offers a four-year full-time BTech course in 6 specialisations. Some of the BTech specialisations include Computer Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Metallurgical and Materials Engineering, and Mining Engineering. Other UG courses include BBA, BCom, and others.

overview_faqs.answer: The tuition fee to be paid for the OPJU BSc (Hons) programme differs based on the choice of specialisation. Moreover, this fees is to be paid semester wise and may differ for each semester. Tabulated below is the course-wise tuition fee to be paid by students:CourseTuition fees (for three years)Biotechnology/DS & AINR 2.5 lakhPhysics, Chemistry, MathsINR 1.29 lakhNote: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: Will I get a fee refund if I withdraw my admission at OPJU?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, students who wish to withdraw their admissions at OPJU are entitled to a refund of fees. However, the refund is subject to the refund policy prescribed by the university. Interested students can check the below table to know the exact refund policy:Time Period (from the day of admission offer)Decution0-15 daysINR 1000 is deducted15-30 days15% of Semester Academic Fee30-45 days 30% of the Semester Academic FeeBeyond 45 days/Commencement of classNo refund

admission_process.title: OPJU - OP Jindal University, Raigarh Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: OP Jindal University Raigarh admission 2025is open. The University offers merit-based admission. Further, for BTech and MBA university accepts various entrance exam scores.OP Jindal University Raigarhoffers UG, PG, diploma and doctoral courses in various specialisations. Students interested in admission to OP Jindal University Raigarh must appear for entrance exams and fill out the eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Want to know more about the OP Jindal University Raigarh admission process 2025 read below:

OP Jindal University Raigarh admission to all the courses is merit-based. However, for admission to BTech and MBA university accepts various national levels exams such as JEE/admission CGPET/CAT/MAT and others. Admission to all UG, PG, diploma and PhD courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course. Additionaly, candidates must appear for the entrance exam for admission to BTech and MBA courses. The table below lists courses offered at OP Jindal University Raigarh courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with a 50% aggregate from a recognised board
JEE Main, CG PET
Bachelor’s degree or equivalent in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate.
CAT/ CMAT/XAT/ MAT/ATMA/ OPJUET
Class 10 and Class 12 with 50% aggregate in their respective subjects (A relaxation of 5% marks in class XII will be made for SC/ST/OBC/specially abled candidates)
Merit-Based
Graduation degree with 50% aggregate in their respective stream
Merit-Based
50% marks in class XII or equivalent in any discipline
Merit-Based
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for more OP Jindal University Raigarh courses

OP Jindal University Raigarh admission procedure has a multi-step process, which has to be fulfilled by all the students to get admission. It starts with the application, students are required to apply and appear for the respective entrance exam and counselling for their desired course. Find below the OP Jindal University Raigarh admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025

Students seeking admission to OP Jindal University Raigarh must apply for the entrance exam accepted by OP Jindal University Raigarh for admission to BTech and MBA courses. Additionaly, students are also required to register themselves by visiting the official website.
Step 2: OP Jindal University Raigarh Selection Criteria

After applying for the entrance exam accepted by the university for admission to BTech and MBA, students are required to appear for the same to fill out the selection criteria for admission. Additionally, for other courses, students must fill out the basic eligibility criteria which include that UG candidates must pass Class 12 with 50% aggregate and PG candidates must have a graduation degree with 50% aggregate.
Step 3: Counselling
For admission to all the courses, it is mandatory to appear for the counselling round conducted by the university for the allocation of seats.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation

After the final round, the university releases the merit list based on the counselling round. The students get shortlisted in the counselling round, they are required to submit theOP Jindal University Raigarh feeto lock in the final seat. If the candidate doesn’t pay the full fee by the stipulated date, the admission will be deemed cancelled and the seat will become vacant for the next round of counselling.

faqs.question: How to apply offline for MBA admissions at OPJU?
faqs.answer: For OPJU MBA admissions, students can apply offline as well as online. To apply offline, students are first required to download the application form. The application is available on the official website of the university. Further students are required to fill out the form and attach scanned copies or required academic documents. After that, the students should also attach a DD of INR 1,000 and post it to the admissions office.

To start, the students seeking admission must apply for the preferred course by visiting the official website of the university. After submitting the application, students must stay updated with the merit list. Those whose names are present in the merit list are required to participate in the subsequent counselling process. faqs.question: Does OPJU Raigarh refund fees?
faqs.answer: Yes, OPJU Raigarh, also known as O.P. Jindal University, refunds fees after the last admission date, excluding OTD. However, admission cancellation can only be done in writing with the registrar's office within the time frame announced by the university.OPJU has some non-refundable fees, including: Caution fee and One-time charges at the time of admission.OPJU also offers scholarships annually, but students must maintain minimum academic performance to continue them. Students selected for scholarships in the first year must complete the entire course at OPJU. The university also offers a 20% discount on transportation fees for female students.So I hope this helps for you. If you have further queries regarding this you can check the website or contact with the officials regarding the same.

faqs.question: Can I apply for admission to OP Jindal University, Raigarh?
faqs.answer: OP Jindal University Raigarh admissions are open for all courses. The college offers merit and entrance-based admission to all UG, PG, and Doctoral courses. Candidates seeking admission to OP Jindal University Raigarh must fill out the online application form by visiting the university official website.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to OP Jindal University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the university offers direct admission to a lot of its courses based on students' aggregate in class 12 and performance in the interview round. For admission, it is further also necessary that the student has passed class 12 with the required marks as per the applied course. Admission to courses such as MBA and BTech is through national-level entrance exams.

placement_data.title: OP Jindal University Raigarh Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: OPJU has concluded the placement drive for the batch passed out in 2023 with 89% placement rate. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during the 2023 placements drive was INR 33 LPA and INR 4.98 LPA , respectively. The institute attracted more than 180 industry giants who offered a variety of job roles to the students of the batch 2023. The top recruiters of OP Jindal University Raigarh placements in 2023 included Axis Securities , Cognizant, Asian Paints, Wipro, TCS, Infosys, JBM Group, JSW , etc.

In addition to offering placement opportunities to the students, the placements wing of the college looks after the training of students continuously. In 2023, the highest number of internships were offered in the Manufacturing/Production sectors (42%) followed by IT & ITEs (20%), and Sales/Marketing (16%).

The actual salary may differ.

hostel_campus.college_name: OP Jindal University Raigarh Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in both the hostel and the college. Classrooms are well-designed. The library is sufficient for your curriculum and other materials. All other competitive exam books are also shelved here. Food is fine with decent medical facilities. Sports equipment and needs are completely taken care of. Hostel facilities given here are quite comfortable with assistance from our wardens who are always ready to help us in every possible way.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements every year.
reviews.review_text: The food taste is average. The staff is friendly and helpful in all sports. They train well in football, badminton, cricket, volleyball, and kabaddi. There is a free gym for all students. The campus and hostel are clean, and hostel rooms are cleaned every day. Every student can use the digital libraries. Smart classrooms and digital libraries are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for B.Tech and management students. We will enjoy the best hostel life here.
reviews.review_text: It has nice classrooms. Labs are very good they use i9 processors. The whole college is connected with Wi-Fi and it provides very fast internet. The library is big and fully air-conditioned. The ground is there for sports. It has a nice hostel with AC and non-AC rooms. Mess is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: "O. P. Jindal University: empowering minds, transforming future".
reviews.review_text: Our college has a robust infrastructure. It has various departments. Our college has more than 10 computer labs. They have computers over 500 and it has a good Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are well-designed, blackboard, green board, and smart board all are present. The library has books of more than 1000 with prominent authors. There also have digital library. In the girl's hostel, the facilities are pretty good. The food available is hygienic and according to the requirements of the season, but...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, experience of this college is good.
reviews.review_text: College has a very decent infrastructure and is well-equipped. You will find electrical labs with various machines to work on and have a decent classroom. Hostels are very beautiful with a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility and a laundry facility, indoor and outdoor games, and a gym. Food of mess varies, sometimes it's exceptionally tasty.

reviews.review_heading: OP Jindal is OP in everything.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of clubs like operations, finance and marketing, they arrange many events and extra curricular activities. There is no issue related to politics and gender. Ragging is prohibited in the campus. The college campus is well maintained. We have our own hostel where all the facilities like food, washing machines, laundry, water, etc. are available. But sometimes electrical problems are faced in the hostels. For sports, we have a  playground in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Really nice infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructural facilities include modern classrooms, modern laboratories, and a big library with a vast collection of books—both academic and non-academic—like self-help books, fiction, biographies, journals, newspapers, etc. The sports facilities are also well developed.

reviews.review_heading: It is a top college in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. We have IT labs, a library, classrooms with smart boards, Wi-Fi, a health center, a cafe, a canteen, a hostel for boys and girls, a mess, 24X7 security, cameras, a playground, etc. Our college provides facilities for sports like basketball, cricket, volleyball, and football.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good and well-facilitated. It provides good hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. The infrastructure of our college is suitable for our department. Wi-Fi is available 24X7 in our college. All classrooms are well-facilitated. The hostel facilities are very good in this college. The food served in the hostel is very hygienic and classy. Medical facilities are available in our college. We can enroll in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Get satisfied with this college education and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided by our college is best and take huge sections of infrastructure in engineering Branch. The quality of food is best in mess and provide the best facilities in hostel my batch mates are literally get satisfied with their hospitality .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the education facilities. Amazing infrastructure, well maintained and green.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is excellent. It has workshops which include operating machines worth crores. It includes mechanical labs such as Heat mass transfer lab, robotics, welding technology, etc. Our campus is surrounded by high-speed wifi 24×7. Books of all kinds are available in our library plus it has a virtual library too. The hostel has its mess with an occupancy of 500 students at a time. Indoor games such as table tennis, and snooker are in the building itself which creates ...

reviews.review_heading: OP Jindal University is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infra of the college is good with all the necessary facilities. The university is fully equipped with Wi-Fi of good speed, and the labs have good equipment and are quite modern. The classrooms are staircase type. The library has well-stocked books for the students. The hostel is hygienic and has an indoor sports facility like a badminton hall, table tennis hall, pool table, carrom and study room, etc.,

reviews.review_heading: Pathetic college in terms of learning, crowd, placement, and exposure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure wise college is good at par with any private college. The classrooms are decent, the hostel is good, the playground is there and the indoor badminton court is there. The gymnasium is decent. Labs are good though and so does the amphitheater. The library is decent with a decent book collection.

reviews.review_heading: OPJU is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and everything here are fine. There are separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. It is about 5 lacs for a hosteler, but the food and other requirements offered by the hostel are good. The hostel offers a very calm atmosphere to learn and grow. The quality of the facilities in the hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games, everything is the best.

reviews.review_heading: An amazing college for topper students as they get very high scholarships and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The university has a very good and well-maintained infrastructure. There is 24/7 electricity, water, Wi-Fi, etc. As it is looked after by Jindal, all the facilities available are very nice compared to any other university in Chattisgarh. The location of the university is very poor because a lot of pollution is there nearby.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Chitkara University offers a programmes at UG, PG, and doctoral levels, through its various schools, like the School of Engineering and Technology, the School of Pharmacy, and the School of Nursing. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BBA, BSc, BPharm, and BCA programmes for a duration of 3-4 years in full-time mode.

In addition to this, the university also offers MTech and MCA programme to students at the PG level for a duration of 2 years. Chitkara University offers a PhD programme in several specialisations like Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Applied Sciences, and Pharmacy. Apart from this, the university also offers 2 integrated programmes, i.e. Integrated BTech + MTech in Computer Science & Engineering and Integrated BCA + MCA. admission_process.title: Chitkara University, Solan Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Chitkara University Solan admission process consists of multiple steps, which begin with filling the application process and proceed with selection steps. Check below the detailed steps for Chitkara University course admission:
Step 1: Application Process

Chitkara University Himachal Pradesh applications are accepted in both online and offline mode. Further, candidates can choose either one of the following method to apply for admission at Chitkara University:
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Chitkara University admissions are offered in two ways, i.e., merit and entrance-based. For courses such as BTech, BSc, BPharma, the university accepts scores of JEE Main, CUET UG and SAT scores, respectively. However, direct admissions are also offered to courses after the successful submission of the application form, except for BTech. Furthermore, a PI round is also conducted for the final selection to BPharm and BCA courses.
Step 3: Counselling Process

After the completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to attend the counselling process for the final seat allotment. Candidates will be required to bring the documents mentioned in the IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS on the day of counselling
Step 4: Admission Confirmation & Fee Submission
After the seat allotment, candidates must make the fee submission to confirm their seats during the counselling process by fulfilling the following requirements:
Students can also check the detailedChitkara University, Solan feestructure here.
lists: Purchase an application from any of the Chitkara Information Centres.
Download the application form, brochure & fee information and submit the form at the admission office of the university.
Apply in online mode at Chitkara University Solan.
Pay the fee in cash or by Demand Draft in favour of “Chitkara University” payable at Chandigarh.
The fees will be paid twice a year in the months as per the university notification.
Delayed payment of fees will be considered as penalty as per the rules and regulations of the University.

placement_data.title: Chitkara University Solan Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: Chitkara University Solan has concluded the placement drive for its Engineering batch passed out in 2023. As per the latest report, the highest package offered to the BTech students during Chitkara University placements in 2023 was INR 1.11 crore per annum. The institute attracted more than 670 industry giants who offered a variety of job roles to Engineering students across sectors, such as Assurance, IT, Education, Operations, Sales and Marketing, etc. The top recruiters of Chitkara University Himachal Pradesh placements in 2023 included Adobe, Deloitte, Amazon, Zomato, ITC, DLF, HP , etc.

tables.context: What is the placement scenario at Chitkara Univers

faqs.question: Does Chitkara University, Himachal Pradesh offer placements abroad?
faqs.answer: Yes, a diverse set of recruiters from various national and multinational companies visited Chitkara University Himachal Pradesh for placements every year. In 2023, the university attracted more than 670 industry giants who offered a variety of job roles to Engineering students across sectors, such as Assurance, IT, Education, Operations, Sales and Marketing, etc. The top recruiters of Chitkara University during the past years included Amazon, Adobe, Deloitte Microsoft, EY, KPMG, PwC, etc. In 2023, the highest package offered to the BTech students during Chitkara University placements in 2023 was INR 1.11 crore per annum.

faqs.question: Does Chitkara University, Himachal Pradesh have good placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, Chitkara University, Himachal Pradesh have good placements percentage and that is nearly 100%.and the top recruiter are TCS, infosy, wipro, TaTa, Deloitte etc. and average package is between 5 to 6 LPA for Cse student and 4 to 5 LPA for other core branch B.Tech courses. Highest package is 35 Lpa from B.tech courses. Note:- The fun part is that you have to go to chitkara university, chandigarh campus for placement.

hostel_campus.college_name: Chitkara University Solan Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: For degree join, else no.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is fairly good with VPN, labs are medium, classes are below average, and the library is average. The hostel is good, but food is below average and the canteen is the worst. Medical facilities are free and average, and sports are limited but okay. Other activities and events are enjoyable. Overall, the infrastructure is acceptable but has room for improvement.

reviews.review_heading: It’s a good college, food is not bad, placement is above average, campus life is great.
reviews.review_text: Classes are good and airy. Labs are spacious. Food is okay, not bad. Hostel facilities are fulfilled generally. Sometimes, some issues occur which are resolved by the respective warden and hostel staff. Infrastructure of classrooms is also good. Labs are according to modern concepts.

reviews.review_heading: Not recommended, you only come if it's the last option.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi doesn't work without wrap. Labs are always under construction. Library is great but the timings are not suitable. All people in the hostel are double faced especially the warden they don't even listen to the parents. If there is any kind of medical emergency, they only say you would have told us before this and that.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent placements, supportive faculty, and modern campus facilities.
reviews.review_text: The course at Chitkara University offers modern facilities, including Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library. Hostels are comfortable, with good food in the mess and canteen. Medical services, sports, and recreational facilities are well-maintained for students’ overall well-being.

reviews.review_heading: Not worth it; you can get a better college.
reviews.review_text: Though the campus is decent, and there are occasional cultural fests and activities, these do little to compensate for the academic shortcomings. Hostels are average at best, with hygiene and food quality being constant issues that become unnecessarily long processes. There's a lot of bureaucracy involved, which creates frustration among students.

reviews.review_heading: For studies, it is a good college. There will be strict action for any non-disciplinary activity.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good. The library is also good. Facilities are overall good. The campus is not big but okay. The hostel is okay.

reviews.review_heading: Strong CSE placements, modern campus, and active student life at Chitkara HP.
reviews.review_text: The CSE department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi and well-equipped labs for AI, ML, IoT and networking. The library is modern with good digital resources. Hostels are clean and secure with 24/7 power. Mess food is average but hygienic. The canteen offers a better variety. Medical facilities are available on campus with a resident doctor. Sports facilities include basketball, volleyball and gym access for students.

reviews.review_heading: You can choose a better college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is decent, and there are occasional cultural fests and activities; these do little to compensate for the academic shortcomings. Hostels are average at best, with hygiene and food quality being constant concerns. Getting documents signed or issues with fee payments become unnecessarily long processes. There's a lot of bureaucracy involved, which creates frustration among students.

reviews.review_heading: Many professors seem disinterested in teaching.
reviews.review_text: Though the campus is decent, and there are occasional cultural fests and activities, these do little to compensate for the academic shortcomings. Hostels are average at best, with hygiene and food quality being constant concerns. Reputation and good infrastructure from the outside, the reality was different. The biggest issue has been the lack of proper faculty engagement. Many professors seem disinterested in teaching and rarely go beyond reading slides. Doubts are often left unresolved, and st...

reviews.review_heading: Chitkara University is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: Chitkara University offered the best rooms and facilities with Wi-Fi and clean water, and well-mannered classmates. The food is healthy and hygienic. There are lots of sports and games like tennis, badminton, kabaddi, gym, and medical facility.

reviews.review_heading: It provides strong placements, modern campus, and great student life experience.
reviews.review_text: The university offers excellent infrastructure for our course, including smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs and a rich digital and physical library. Campus is modern and student-friendly supporting both academics and innovation. Hostels are well-maintained with clean rooms,  24/7 water and electricity and Wi-Fi. Mess provides hygienic food with a decent variety and multiple canteens offer snacks and meals throughout the day. Medical facilities are available on campus...

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure. Good college for CSE with decent internships and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: State-of-the-art computer labs are available, equipped with high-speed internet and modern machines. 24/7 Wi-Fi-enabled campus. Wi-Fi is available in labs, academic blocks, library, and hostels. Speed is generally stable but can vary during peak hours, according to student reviews. Smart classrooms are available with projectors, whiteboards, and sound systems. Comfortable seating and air ventilation. Each classroom supports digital learning. Large central library is available with thousands of b...

reviews.review_heading: Chitkara offers great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Modern labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi campus, rich library. Hostels are clean with 24/7 security, Wi-Fi, and laundry. Mess food is decent, and canteens offer variety. On-campus medical center with ambulance service. Great sports facilities including courts, gym, and fields.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Chitkara University is best. Best Wi-Fi connections, labs are good and in working condition. Classrooms are best and comfortable for the students. Library is best for studying, with no noise and pindrop silence. Quality of food is average in mess. Medical facilities are A+, sports and games are also A+.

reviews.review_heading: College is best according to education and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best. Wi-Fi is good but locked by the college server. Few things work on their Wi-Fi. Labs are good and practical works are also done. It has computers in the best condition. Classrooms are good. The library is best for studying. Many study materials are available.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The mode of admission at Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training, Chennai is online. HIMT Chennai offers a wide array of maritime courses at both pre-sea and post-sea levels, including BTech and BSc. Apart from UG courses, the institute also offers diploma, certificate, and other specialised courses in the fields of Marine Engineering and Nautical Science, including programmes such as IMEC Diploma in Nautical Science and IMEC Indian Graduate Marine Engineering (GME) Cadet Programme. The duration of each course differs depending on the nature of its curriculum. The Institute offers admission to BTech and BSc candidates based on their rank in . Below mentioned are some of the and their respective eligibility and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The primary eligibility requirements for admissions to BSc courses at HIMT Chennai are that candidates must complete their Class 12 from the PCM stream with at least an aggregate of 60% and 50% in English at the Class 10 & 12 levels. Additionally, for the admission process, the college accepts valid IMU CET scores. There are different eligibility requirements too,  that candidates must follow before getting admission, such as candidates' age should be: General: 27 years, OBC (NCL): 30 years, SC/ST: 32 years (from the commencement of the academic session).Candidates must be medically fit, including eyesight and hearing, as prescribed in the Merchant Shipping (Medical examination) rules,  2000, and need to produce a certificate of medical fitness issued by a D.G. Shipping Approved Doctor.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BSc at HIMT Chennai?

faqs.answer: A:    The total fee for BTech courses at HIMT Chennai includes several components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, admission fee, academic fee, etc.  The course fees can be paid semester-wise from the second year. Subsequent semester fees have to be paid online prior to the first day of May and November. Check out the fee components and amount in the table below:Fee componentsAmount (for 3 - 4 years)TuitionINR 9 Lacs - INR 13 lakh One-time PaymentINR 25,000Total feeINR 9.25 Lacs - INR 13.25 lakhThe fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change. Therefore, it is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fees for BTech at HIMT Chennai?

faqs.answer: A:    The admissions at HIMT College (Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training) is based on the candidate's performance in the entrance exam. There is an entrance exam known as IMUCET (Indian Maritime University Common Entrance Test) which the candidates need to give.  The IMU CET entrance exam is conducted in CBT (Computer Based Test) mode annually. Depending upon the performance of the candidate, it allows the students to take admission in the all 6 campuses of IMU (Indian Maritime University).
faqs.question: Are admissions at HIMT College (Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training) entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: A:     IMU-CET (Indian Maritime University Common Entrance Test) entrance exam scores are accepted by HIMT College (Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training) for admission. It is a national-level common entrance test for admission to various courses offered at IMU campuses conducted by Indian Maritime University. The candidates who clear the entrance exam are called for their psychometric test, medical examination followed by panel interview and pre-sea training. Only after clearing all these stages, the candidate is eligible to take admission in HIMT college.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by HIMT College (Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training) for admission?

reviews_list.review_title: Excellent facilities and instructors.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing a Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS). Our batch has 40 students, and all have sponsored by the Mediterranean shipping company (M.Sc). We are completing the course in December 2025 and joining as deck cadets in the upcoming months. HIMT has a very good placement record. faqs.answer: Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training, Chennai is not too much costly .The campus and infrastructure is well built. The courses fees is around INR 4 Lacs to INR 13 lakh including the mess and hostel. If you get scholarship the tuition fees will be less and you can there easily with INR 3 lakh to INR 10 lakh. The costs also depend on which course you gonna take. You can also check course wise fees on Shiksha.com or college website.
faqs.question: Q: How costly is HIMT Chennai?

faqs.answer: Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training, Chennai offers BTech and BSc programmes at the UG level. HIMT Chennai admission to the UG courses is determined by candidates' ranks in IMUCET, while for other programs, HIMT administers an entrance examination. Successful candidates in the respective exams proceed to an interview and medical examination for final selection. To get admitted to HIMT, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process at Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training is conducted online.
faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission in HIMT Chennai?

faqs.answer: Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT Chennai) is a private institute, located in Kilpauk, Chennai, Tamil Nadu. It has four campuses in Kilpauk, Tidel Park, Kalpakkam, and Vizag. Established in 1998, HIMT is the only Institute in India to offer the maximum courses (90+) approved by the DG of Shipping. The institute is affiliated with the Indian Maritime University. HIMT Chennai is approved by the Directorate General of Shipping (DGS) and the Ministry of Shipping (Government of India) with a sanctioned intake of 60 students for each course.
faqs.question: Q: Why choose HIMT Chennai?

faqs.answer: The primary eligibility requirements for admissions to BSc courses at HIMT Chennai are that candidates must complete their Class 12 from the PCM stream with at least an aggregate of 60% and 50% in English at the Class 10 & 12 levels. Additionally, for the admission process, the college accepts valid IMU CET scores. There are different eligibility requirements too, that candidates must follow before getting admission, such as candidates' age should be: General: 27 years, OBC (NCL): 30 years, SC/ST: 32 years (from the commencement of the academic session).Candidates must be medically fit, including eyesight and hearing, as prescribed in the Merchant Shipping (Medical examination) rules, 2000, and need to produce a certificate of medical fitness issued by a D.G. Shipping Approved Doctor.
faqs.question: Q: Who is eligible for BSc at HIMT Chennai?

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: HIMT excels in training.

content.Placements: I am part of the DNS Batch of 2025-2026. We are placed in the Mediterranean Shipping Company. Our batch is 100% placed in the course. The highest package offered is $370 per month for the position of deck cadets upon joining the job.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure during the course are phenomenal, with Wi-Fi. Classrooms, and labs equipped with the latest technology. Food quality is great. Hostel, canteen, medical, and sports facilities are very good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely worthy to join HIMT. HIMT teaches us to tackle loneliness, homesickness, and challenges.

content.Placements: The placement record of our batch is 100 percent. We were placed by M.Sc. before joining HIMT itself. Top recruiting companies for DNS are IMEC, Synergy, BSM, etc. No internship is required, and it will be provided during this course, and the one job we all will get will be as a deck cadet on a merchant vessel.
content.Infrastructure: In our whole campus, accommodation is provided, an academic block, a galley (mess room), turf for playing football, cricket, basketball, a ground for volleyball, a library, and each class has a maximum space of 40 students, with smart board facility as well as AC provided there.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent facilities and instructors.

content.Placements: I am pursuing a Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS). Our batch has 40 students, and all have sponsored by the Mediterranean shipping company (M.Sc). We are completing the course in December 2025 and joining as deck cadets in the upcoming months. HIMT has a very good placement record. Companies like BSM, M.Sc, Synergy, Zodiac, MOL, and PIL regularly visit the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best in HIMT. It includes all the required departments, like we have a VR lab, library, seamanship lab, workshop, turf for playing cricket, football, pickleball, badminton, and basketball. The quality of food is good, and the hostel has very good infrastructure, and there is an indoor sports room on each floor of the E block.

content.Infrastructure: About infrastructure, it was very spacious and green campus. Everything that we had, like a hostel room, swimming, computer lab, Seamen ship lab, was built with world-class technology, and they have a VR simulator which made us learn with real-life situations.

individual_reviews.course: Graduate Marine Engineering (GME) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: GME course from HIMT is a pathway to a successful career.

content.Placements: About 80% of students are placed in various shipping companies like MMSI, M.Sc., BSM, Damico, and Zodiac, all selected as TME. At HIMT, if you have good academics and speak well, getting a placement is not difficult. Focus on the basics and have good communication skills. That is the shortcut for placement.
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, you get a sharing room space. You get your own bed, cot, pillow, and all covers, one study table and chair each, and one cupboard space. You also get all toiletries, uniforms, and books on campus. The fees are inclusive of all this. Mess is also provided, where you get meals three times a day and coffee and tea twice a day.

admission_process.title: HIMT College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HIMT Chennai offers UG and PG courses. The institute offers courses in Engineering, Marine Science and other specialisations. The selection for the courses is based onIMUCETorTNEA. Candidates have to fill out the application form for the preferred course.
Check below HIMT College courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics and English as compulsory subjects with a minimum aggregate of 60% in PCM. Minimum 50% aggregate in English at Class 10 and 12 level is also mandatory
17 to 25 years at the time of admission

Check below step-wise admission process for HIMT College:
1: Application Process
Aspirants can download the application form from the college's website.
2: Selection Rounds
The selection for BSc and certificate courses is based on IMUCET scores of the candidates. Admission to BTech course is based on TNEA rank of the candidates.
3: Merit List Release & Counselling

Selected candidates have to further participate in the counselling rounds. The institute releases a merit list to announce the names of selected aspirants. Further, candidates have to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

reviews.review_heading: HIMT excels in training.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure during the course are phenomenal, with Wi-Fi. Classrooms, and labs equipped with the latest technology. Food quality is great. Hostel, canteen, medical, and sports facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely worthy to join HIMT. HIMT teaches us to tackle loneliness, homesickness, and challenges.
reviews.review_text: In our whole campus, accommodation is provided, an academic block, a galley (mess room), turf for playing football, cricket, basketball, a ground for volleyball, a library, and each class has a maximum space of 40 students, with smart board facility as well as AC provided there.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent facilities and instructors.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in HIMT. It includes all the required departments, like we have a VR lab, library, seamanship lab, workshop, turf for playing cricket, football, pickleball, badminton, and basketball. The quality of food is good, and the hostel has very good infrastructure, and there is an indoor sports room on each floor of the E block.

reviews.review_heading: Asia's top maritime college.
reviews.review_text: About infrastructure, it was very spacious and green campus. Everything that we had, like a hostel room, swimming, computer lab, Seamen ship lab, was built with world-class technology, and they have a VR simulator which made us learn with real-life situations.

reviews.review_heading: GME course from HIMT is a pathway to a successful career.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, you get a sharing room space. You get your own bed, cot, pillow, and all covers, one study table and chair each, and one cupboard space. You also get all toiletries, uniforms, and books on campus. The fees are inclusive of all this. Mess is also provided, where you get meals three times a day and coffee and tea twice a day.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college for GME in India.
reviews.review_text: We have various labs like the Basic Skills Workshop, where we do hot works, welding and gas cutting, fitting, plumbing, lathe, etc. We have an Auxiliary Machines Workshop with equipment like pumps, valves, air compressors, heat exchangers, purifiers, pistons, lines, crankshafts, etc. We also have a fully equipped Electrical Lab, an operational ship on campus, and a VR lab.

reviews.review_heading: I get placed in MMSI through HIMT after completing GME.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are excellent. We have a world-class sports complex including a basketball court, football turf, cricket turf, pickleball courts, swimming pool, laundry service, separate hostels for boys and girls, a ship on campus, state-of-the-art virtual reality labs, and many more. The hostel can accommodate around 800 cadets.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college for B.Tech Marine Engineering.
reviews.review_text: We have a ship on campus, where we get to see and operate all the live machinery that is available on board a ship. We also have a state-of-the-art facility, which is our virtual reality lab, where we have fully immersive ship visits. Apart from this, we have a swimming pool, sports turf and complex, air-conditioned classrooms, good hostels, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My success story as B.Tech Marine Engineering Cadet.
reviews.review_text: We have about 14 acres of greenery-filled campus with all the advanced facilities like dedicated hostel blocks for girls and boys, swimming pool facilities, gym, sports turf for football and cricket, virtual reality labs, smart classrooms with AC, ship in campus and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Do B.Tech in Marine Engineering only at HIMT College.
reviews.review_text: HIMT College is a green, lush campus. It spread across 15 acres of land with dedicated academic blocks. It also has hostel blocks, labs and workshops, a mess area that accommodates 400 at a time, an auditorium with centralized AC, a well-equipped gym, a swimming pool, and a sports complex. All facilities required for training and recreation are available within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended college for B.Tech Marine Engineering.
reviews.review_text: At HIMT College, nobody can beat the infrastructure. We have all the latest equipment and advanced technologies for maritime training. Whether it is digital innovation or physical equipment, HIMT College has it all, with smartboards and AC in all classrooms and labs.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the experience was really good, and I am really happy and thankful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is really good, and also there are all the necessary labs like BSW, ASW, electrical, and automation labs. There is also a ship on the campus (SIC) which gives the experience of the ship with the actual engine room and bridge.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive and industry-ready training for aspiring Electro-Technical Officers.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the ETO course at HIMT are designed to meet international maritime training standards. Our institute is well-regarded for its emphasis on providing a holistic student experience, including excellent hostel, mess, medical, and recreational facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am feeling proud to study in HIMT college, where the faculty members and batchmates are helpful.
reviews.review_text: The ambiance of HIMT feels good and peaceful. Classrooms are provided with air conditioning facilities, and my college has a VR lab facility. Every week, there will be two periods for the library, and the books in the library are useful. Cadets from any state in India can have good food and feel good with the facilities of the hostel. Indoor and outdoor sports facilities are available, and we can play every evening.

reviews.review_heading: HIMT is one of the best platforms to pursue your career as a Marine.
reviews.review_text: Our college consists of a beautiful environment with modern labs like AMW, BSW Seamanship Lab, Electrical Lab, Automation Lab, Virtual Reality Lab, ER Resource Lab, Ship Simulator, etc. The Ship in Campus provides a real shipboard machinery experience, which helps to boost your knowledge.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training (HIMT)

likes.text: Top recruiting companies for our course are MOL Tankers, Goodwood, Chellship, MSI, MOL Container and Sanmar.
The best part of HIMT about the placements is their placement cell do not forget their students in case they pass out of the college without placements.

college_info.college_name: HIMT Chennai Scholarship Details

paragraphs: HIMT Chennai offers nearly 15 types of scholarships to make education accessible to students from all economic strata. Some of the Hindustan Institute of Maritime Training scholarships are explained in a brief below:

Every year, several scholarships are awarded to students from the low-income group who record meritorious academic performance continuously and demonstrate economic needs. Madhurika Educational and Charitable trust has instituted three such scholarships for GP Rating students with the objective to provide financial support to them. Each student pursuing the GP Rating course is granted an amount of Rs 25,000.
The Institute offers 50% waiver on tuition fees to the students whose parent has been martyred while in the service of Indian Armed Forces (Army/ Navy/ Airforce).
A waiver of INR 25,000 on tuition fee is available for all female candidates across all courses.

HIMT has taken an initiative to be a part of the skill development mission for Lakshadweep administration. Candidates with a proof of their nativity from Lakshadweep can pursue GP Rating course for INR 1,35,000.

individual_reviews.title: Insights of NIT Karnataka.

content.Placements: Nitk mechanical is the best among all NITs in the QRF ranking. It has a placement rate of about 85 percent. Major core companies that came for placements this year were Apple for mechanical with a minor in ECE, L&T, Bajaj, Suzuki, ONGC, and HPCL. IN 2025 the average package for mechanical is 15 LPA. Internship opportunities are abundant across branches with a stipend of roughly 20k to 1 Lakh per month and many PPOs.
content.Infrastructure: Mechanical depth of Nitk has one of the best infrastructures among all departments. It has all the research related facilities, specialized labs like CAD/CAM, Internal combustion engines, and advanced research labs in areas such as strength of materials, robotics etc. Hostels have double and triple sharing rooms with 2 common washrooms on each floor. Ethernet facility for the internet.
