admission_overview.title: Mysore University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Mysore University admission is both entrance or merit-based depending upon the applied course. The university conducts Postgraduate Entrance Exam (PGEE) for admission to PG courses. University of Mysore only offers PG courses on its campus. Additionally, all the UG programmes offered here are only provided via the constituent colleges under the university. The university has 235+ affiliated colleges and five constituent colleges incorporated under it. It is also accredited with ‘Grade A’ by NAAC and offers various UG, PG, MPhil and Doctorate programmes in multiple disciplines. Besides the regular courses, the university offers UG and PG courses in online mode through the Directorate of Online Programmes, UOM. The university also offers PG courses such as MA, MSc, MCom, etc. in distance education mode through the Directorate of Distance Education.

eligibility_selection.title: Mysore University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: University of Mysore course admissions are entrance-based for most of the courses. The university offers seats based on preset admission criteria. For admission to all PG courses, the university conducts PGEE. Students must also fulfil the basic eligibility specific to the preferred course. The minimum qualification required for Mysore University course admissions is as below:

admission_process.title: Mysore University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Mysore University admissionis entrance-based for a majority of courses. Aspirants are selected for admission based on their entrance exam or qualifying exam marks. The process starts with an eligibility check. Eligible students can then apply online. Check below theUniversity of Mysore admission process:
University of Mysore Application Process 2026

Students can apply for any of the UG or PG courses at the official website of UOM. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 300 for UG courses and INR 400 for PG programmes. Besides, aspirants applying for PG programmes also need to fill  the entrance exam form. Candidates, irrespective of their category, have to payINR 1,000separately for the entrance exam andINR 2,000for group subjects.
University of Mysore Selection Process 2026

University of Mysore conducts thePGEEfor all PG courses offered by the university. Besides, the university also accepts national or state-level entrance exams for admission to specific courses. The entrance exams accepted areMAT, CAT, Karnataka PGCET, KCET, etc. Once the candidates are selected, the university releases a merit list.
Admission Confirmation & Seat Allotment 2026

Admission to some of the courses is throughKEA Counselling. After the counselling, candidates are allotted seat in Mysore University. For other courses, candidates must bring their documents for verification and pay theMysore University admissionfeeto confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I do MSc correspondence in Mysore University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mysore University offers two-year MSc IT course in distance education mode through Directorate of Distance University. Aspirants need to complete BSc degree with Computer Science orMathematicsas one of the optional subjects or any degree with Diploma in Computer Application or BCA/ BTech/ BE in any branch with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ CAT-I) to apply for MSc IT.

faqs.question: How can I take admission to the University of Mysore in an MSc programme?

After the conclusion of the application procedure, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected students. Mysore University selects candidates for MSc based on PGEE conducted by the university. For MSc Biotechnology, aspirants are selected based on GAT-B score.

faqs.question: Is Mysore University degree valid?
faqs.answer: Mysore University is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and is accredited with A Grade by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC). The University of Mysore has also been ranked 44 in the University category and 71 in the Overall category by NIRF ranking 2023. The university, through its around 228 affiliated colleges and 85 PG departments, offers UG, PG Diploma PG Diploma and Certificate courses to the students. Some of the names of the top recruiters who visited the campus for placements include Infosys, TCS, Wipro, IBM, EY, HCL, etc.

faqs.question: What are the courses that University of Mysore offers?
faqs.answer: The University of Mysore has undergraduate (UG),  (PG) postgraduate, & research programmes available for students. Some of the streams are Humanities, Arts, Science, Law, Commerce, IT and Software, Business Management, and Education. The duration of these courses ranges between one to 5 years. The entrance examinations accepted include CMAT, GMAT, MAT, CAT, Karnataka PGCET XAT, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in University of Mysore?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must start by filling out the application form online. Mysore University admissions are mostly based on entrance-exam score. The university conducts Postgraduate Entrance Exam (PGEE) for all PG courses offered by the university. Besides, the university also accepts national or state-level entrance exams for admission to specific courses. The entrance exams accepted are MAT, CAT, Karnataka PGCET, KCET, etc. Once the candidates are selected, the university releases a merit list.

placement_data.title: University of Mysore Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placement details of 2025 batch are yet to be released on the official website of University of Mysore. However, the institute has released the NIRF report 2025 which includes the placement details for the batch 2024. According to the report, 4 UG 4 year students were placed out of the total 8 graduated students during University of Mysore placements 2024 with a median package of INR 4.75 LPA . In UG 5-year program, 42 students of the batch 2024 got placements with a median salary of INR 5.25 LPA.

In PG 1-year program , 49 students of the batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 2.35 LPA. Further, 1983 students from the PG 2 year batch 2024 secured placements with the median salary of INR 3.8 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of Mysore University in therecent past include Wipro, TCS, IBM, Infosys, TCS, ONGC , etc.
Download : University of Mysore NIRF Report 2025

The institute is ranked #71 in the University category, and #20 under State Public University by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around University of Mysore rankings:

nirf.description:
University of Mysore has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for University of Mysore indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, University of Mysore climbed -15 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, University of Mysore fell 17 ranks to #71 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, University of Mysore fell 1 rank to #20 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Based on the rankings from QS World University Rankings, University of Mysore outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the QS World University Rankings system. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, University of Mysore fell 154 ranks to #675 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, University of Mysore fell 58 ranks to #206 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: University of Mysore India  Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

hostel.description: The University maintains seven Men’s hostels and four Women’s hostels. All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security, and surveillance system etc.For International Students there are two International Hostels with 90 spacious rooms, each with a balcony opening to the picturesque Kukkarahalli Lake. The independent rooms are equipped with space for study, internet connectivity, kitchenette facility, attached washrooms and enclosed chests for safekeeping of belongings. The International Hostel also houses two computer labs and a spacious dining hall cum kitchen complex. Students pursuing only Diploma/ Certificate courses are not eligible for hostel facilities.

library.description: The library has a collection of more than 7,00,000 books. It currently subscribes to more than 225 Indian Journals, 16 foreign journals, 24 popular magazines and 20 newspapers. It has around 15,000 reports and Govt. publications, 20000 Theses and Dissertations, 150,000 bound volumes of journals, 350 microforms; 40 audio cassettes, 38 video cassettes, and more than 50 CDROMs and 50 multimedia CDs on various aspects including National Geographic and Britannica Encyclopedia.

The hostel accommodation was quite good, and the meals were pretty tasty, whether you were eating at the mess or the canteen. Don't forget the multi-sports complex!

reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, and infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is provided and very useful for networking. In labs, AC and projectors are provided. Classrooms are good, and AC and projectors are provided for display. The library is good and provides AC and projectors. Hostel is good, with quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by JSS College of Arts, Commerce and Science (JSSCACS)

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good at a graduation college. Classrooms are decent. Labs are spacious and have all facilities like water and gas connections. Wi-Fi is only in the classrooms. The library is good, and all types of books and study materials are available. There are two hostels, one boys' hostel and a girls' hostel, inside the campus. Food is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by NIT Surathkal - National Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: NIT Surathkal College Review.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available all across campus, and the hostels have LAN, too. The labs were fully stocked and really good. The library had over 200,000 books on just about every topic you can think of. I would have to say, when it comes to food, I would give it a 2 out of 5. The medical and sports facilities were pretty solid overall. The second year student hostels arena. It was the best, but the others were just fine. The food was decent, too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NIT Surathkal - National Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: NIT Surathkal College review.
reviews.review_text: The campus includes all the essential academic and research buildings, a central library, well equipped labs, and classrooms with Wi-Fi. Students could use residential facilities and dining halls. The hostel accommodation was generally seen as satisfactory. The food in the mess was just average. It was a health center with medical professionals available, in case someone got sick.

data.description: For the holistic development of the students, the university has a separate cell called the Directorate of Physical Education, which looks after the sports-related events. The University of Mysore sports facilities include three cricket grounds, four tennis courts, a cinder track, three basketball courts , etc. It also has Nalwadi Krishnaraja Wadiyar, Gangotri Glades, and three indoor stadiums. A well-equipped large gymnasium and a well-maintained swimming pool are also available for the students to focus on their physical health.

highlights.summary:
The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for TAT - Trident Academy of Technology admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students looking for better jobs
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

fees_and_eligibility.overview: TAT - Trident Academy of Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, TAT - Trident Academy of Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. TAT - Trident Academy of Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,44,000 to 3,56,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of TAT - Trident Academy of Technology.

review_content.Placements: In the college, placements are good as they have mentioned the placement target is 83.1% I think that is also true. The highest package offered is 24 LPA and the lowest package that students got is 2.8 LPA. The average package is 4.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Deloitte, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, Capgemini, Kovair, etc. Students get internships at college if they want. Roles offered by the course are junior software engineer, code reviewer, data analyst, and cloud computing master.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided by the college like Wi-Fi, labs, AC classrooms, and a library. The hostel is very good and the environment is very good at the hostel. Students enjoy their freedom but one thing is in the hostel, the food quality is not so good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: About my college, it is very good.

review_content.Placements: I am from the B.Tech Computer Science batch of 2024. Around forty percent of students were placed. The highest package was seven lacs per annum, the lowest was around two point five lacs, and the average was three point five lacs. Top recruiters included TCS, Wipro, and Infosys. Around thirty percent of students got internships in companies like Internshala, startups, and small IT firms. Most roles offered were software developer, support engineer, and testing.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are average with basic amenities. Rooms are often crowded, and maintenance is slow. The faculty at our college is knowledgeable and supportive, always ready to help students understand concepts better. The curriculum is well-structured and regularly updated. Exams are conducted fairly, with a focus on both understanding and application.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college hospitality is very good and healthy.

content.Placements: Our college gives good placements to students, with a minimum of 80% and a maximum of 90% of students placed in different companies like Aditya Birla, Mahindra, Tata Group, Infosys, etc., at good packages of 9 to 15 LPA. Our college provides internships to all semester students every year.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel rooms are very good, and the quality of the food is also very nice. Our classrooms are well-designed and well-furnished, and A/C is included in our classrooms. Our college provides 24/7 high-speed Wi-Fi to all students. Our college has a well-stocked library for students, and various labs are available for students.

individual_reviews.title: Review of TAT - Trident Academy of Technology.

content.Infrastructure: To be exact honest infrastructure was top class. Buildings were very good. Every classroom had smart boards and projectors. There were library, computer laboratories, auditorium halls, conference halls, etc. Park and cafeteria were also there. Hostels were also in good condition.

placement_data.title: TAT - Trident Academy of Technology Placement overview
paragraphs: Q. How promising are the placements of BTech at Trident Academy of Technology?
A. BTech placements at Trident Academy of Technology are good. 60-70 companies visit the campus every year out of which maximum companies offer a higher-end package.
Q. Which are the top companies that visit the Trident Academy of Technology for campus placement every year?

A. Hirecraft Software Pvt Ltd, Tata Consultancy Services, Trianz Holdings, HCL, Capgemini, Tudip Technologies, SPML Infra, and Global tech promoters are the top companies that visit the campus every year.
Q. What is the 2019 placement statistics of Trident Academy of Technology?

A. About 15% of the students were placed in top-notch companies. The highest salary package of 12 LPA and the lowest salary package of 2 LPA and the average salary package of 4 LPA were offered. TCS was the top recruiter and system analyst was the top role offered.
Q. Does Trident Academy of Technology offer internships to its students?

A. About 80% of the students get on-campus internships in various companies. The most number of internships are offered by Indian Rail. Other internship offering companies are Google, DRDO and Amazon.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at TAT - Trident Academy of Technology?
faqs.answer: As per Shiksha verified reviews, TAT - Trident Academy of Technology has an impressive review rating of 3.68 by 166 students.

faqs.answer: TAT - Trident Academy of Technology offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 5.1 LPA to MCA students.

Recently, the institute ranked #154 in The Week 2025 under the Engg category, and #127 under Engg (Private). The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around TAT - Trident Academy of Technology rankings:

rankings.highlight: Best Among The Week Ranked Colleges In Orissa In 2025

hostel_campus.college_name: TAT - Trident Academy of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Our college hospitality is very good and healthy.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel rooms are very good, and the quality of the food is also very nice. Our classrooms are well-designed and well-furnished, and A/C is included in our classrooms. Our college provides 24/7 high-speed Wi-Fi to all students. Our college has a well-stocked library for students, and various labs are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of TAT - Trident Academy of Technology.
reviews.review_text: To be exact honest infrastructure was top class. Buildings were very good. Every classroom had smart boards and projectors. There were library, computer laboratories, auditorium halls, conference halls, etc. Park and cafeteria were also there. Hostels were also in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Review of TAT - Trident Academy of Technology.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are provided by the college like Wi-Fi, labs, AC classrooms, and a library. The hostel is very good and the environment is very good at the hostel. Students enjoy their freedom but one thing is in the hostel, the food quality is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: About my college, it is very good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are average with basic amenities. Rooms are often crowded, and maintenance is slow. The faculty at our college is knowledgeable and supportive, always ready to help students understand concepts better. The curriculum is well-structured and regularly updated. Exams are conducted fairly, with a focus on both understanding and application.

reviews.review_heading: Trident Academy of Technology in Bhubaneswar for M.Tech course admission.
reviews.review_text: This college has the best facilities and uses high-quality products like classrooms, labs, drinking water machines, a library, bathrooms, etc. These facilities are provided. Every year, the college organizes sports and games like kabaddi, cricket, carrom, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and worthy for price.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides smart classrooms, a big smart auditorium, 3 libraries, and 5G Wi-Fi network access to everyone. Hostel facilities are not bad. We have tasty food at affordable prices in canteen. Students can practice outdoor games on the college ground.

reviews.review_heading: It has value for money. If you budget under 80,000 then you can go for it.
reviews.review_text: It's good though with the fee but rooms are not air-conditioned rather the facilities are okay. Free Wi-Fi for all students and outdoor games facility are also great. The quality of food is average though it's eatable. The library is universal with almost every book needed for the course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of TAT - Trident Academy of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are the best. In the library, we will get whatever book we want to read. The hostel is good, and the best thing is the mess food. Sports and games facilities are good. There is a gym in our college. There is a table tennis court and also a yoga room.

reviews.review_heading: This place gives a really good education and a good environment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are adequate, offering basic amenities. However, room occupancy is frequently high, maintenance response times are slow, and the quality of food requires enhancement. Cleanliness and hygiene standards are consistent. Consequently, extended stays are not recommended.

reviews.review_heading: Life in Trident Academy of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Trident Academy of Technology is not much good and big. Wi-Fi is available on college campus. All labs are AC-fitted, classrooms have no AC, and library also has no AC. I don't live in hostel, but some of my hostel friends are told that the fee of hostel is costly. On campus, there is a cricket field and a badminton court. Medical facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Trident Academy of Technology College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in this college are limited. You will not find a good Wi-Fi connection. The Wi-Fi is only available for those who live in the hostel, and it has very low bandwidth. Labs are good and have proper seating arrangements. However, you cannot sit comfortably for too long in the lab, as it only has plastic chairs.

reviews.review_heading: At last, Trident Academy of Technology is good for engineering studies.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college is very good. The college also provides a fully Wi-Fi campus, library, workshop, lab, etc. There are 2 boys' hostels and 1 girls' hostel in this college, including a mess and canteen. There are 4-seater rooms with separate balconies, and we can choose the option of AC and non-AC rooms.

.

reviews.review_heading: Reality of Trident academy of technology.
reviews.review_text: The course is okay, not that good, as this college is under BPUT, so as per the BPUT syllabus, there isn't any programming language in the 1st sem. But faculty members are very good and student-friendly. Coming to the hostel, it is very unhygienic. Mess food is okay. Labs are good. Classrooms are good with proper ventilation and lighting. The library is very large with 30,000+ books. Also, there is an e-library in this college. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Trident academy of technology (M.Tech, etc.).
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure-wise, our college is one of the best in Bhubaneswar. Coming to lab facilities, we have an advanced lab with PARAM. In the ECE department, we have design tools like Vivado and Synopsys. The campus area has a garden and separate areas for sports like basketball, football, volleyball, and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure and facilities with affordable fee.
reviews.review_text: The campus and overall infrastructures are pretty good. The classrooms can easily fit up to 65 students comfortably, but there are very few classes with ACs and Smart boards. They have Wi-Fi facilities but it have very low range. Other than this, all other facilities are good and easily available like cafeterias, washrooms, drinking water, laboratories, etc.

review_content.Placements: On average, 60 percent of the students were placed in our batch. The placement cell helps a lot and conducts many classes to improve the skills and power of knowledge. The highest package goes to 10 LPA and the average package is 4 to 5 LPA. So it was good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is really good and the college provides a big library with all the books. The classroom is neat and clean and has proper seating capacity. There is Wi-Fi in all departments. The hostel is very good and liberal.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Kalvium excels in VELS with its work, program, offering great placements and a bright future.

review_content.Placements: I am currently enrolled in the Kalvium WIP (Work Integrated Programme) offered by B.Tech CSE at Vels University. This program has excellent placement opportunities, with a package of 10 lakhs per annum. It covers various subjects such as app development, web development, and web designing. While there are other courses available, this particular course stands out as the best option under the CSE department at Vels University.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university offers reliable Wi-Fi connectivity, with excellent facilities in the labs and an average setup in the classrooms. The library is outstanding, providing students with a conducive learning environment. Additionally, the college provides a gym for hostlers, along with laundry services. However, the hostel is considered average and has strict rules. On a positive note, the mess and canteen serve good quality food. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports and games options are satisfactory. Although there is a swimming pool, it is currently non-functional and requires improvement.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. individual_reviews.title: Reality of so called reputed university.

content.Placements: Placements are pretty mediocre at their best, only 30 percent of students get placed mainly in software based companies and we do not have proof that we ever have a product based company for placements. The roles offered are pretty basic and only very few get the opportunity for internship.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is below average. You get pretty slow Wi-Fi in campuses, classrooms are cleaned once a week, medical facilities are not free and they are very expensive if it is an emergency too and the hostel is fine there is nothing too fancy or bad, but the food is bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of good placements, faculty, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: They provide more placement opportunities in our university. They have tie-ups with reputed software companies like IBM, Cognizant, Philips, and other reputed companies. They also give placement training to ace the placement. Placement training exams are conducted every semester.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. AC classrooms with smart classes. Big auditorium. There's a library in which all journals, books, and e-books are available and easy to access. Hostels are good too, and hostel food is good. We have AC facilities in laboratories. Laboratories are good too.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in all aspects.

content.Placements: Our college provides average placements. Many students got placed in our college. The placement percentage of our college is around 75-92%. The highest salary package offered ranges between 15 LPA - 40 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 6 LPA. The top recruiting company is IBM. Around 30-70% of students got internships. Top roles offered are software engineer, software developer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all facilities. The Wi-Fi facility is average, but in the lab, very high-speed internet is available for learning, faculty research, and online resources. There are well-equipped computers with modern hardware and software to support multiple programming languages and other technical activities. Classrooms are equipped with projectors to enhance the learning experience. A huge library is available in our college. It has a vast collection of books, research papers, and journals related to computer science and engineering. Our college has huge seminar halls. The hostel facilities are moderate and comfortable. The hostel rooms are spacious. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. The food served in the mess and canteen is good and hygienic. They serve vegetarian and non-vegetarian food items. Medical facilities are average. Medical facilities are available 24X7. They provide medical and sports facilities. A gymnasium is available in our college.

placement_data.title: School of Engineering Placement overview
paragraphs: The Centre for Career Department ( CCD ) takes care of all placement related activities at VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies ( VISTAS ). Apart from conducting placement drives, CCD conducts general aptitude, soft skills, communication skills and technical training sessions.

School of Engineering, VISTAS placement session 2019 concluded with 92 per cent success rate. Out of 306 students, who registered for the placement drive, 295 students were deemed eligible to proceed with the further rounds. Over 20 students got more than two job offers. Top recruiters, including IBM, ZOHO and Amazon visit VISTAS every year for recruitment.
Mentioned below are the highlights related to School of Engineering, VISTAS placements:

A. School of Engineering, VISTAS is known for its placements record. Placement drive 2019 concluded with 92 per cent placement record.
Q. How many students participated in School of Engineering, VISTAS recruitment drive 2019?
A. In total, 306 students registered for placement drive 2019 out of which 295 students advanced to further rounds.
Q. What is the average salary package offered to the students of School of Engineering, VISTAS?
A. The average salary package offered was Rs 4.60 LPA.
Q. What are the objectives of School of Engineering, VISTAS training and placement cell?
A. The training and placement cell is responsible for maintaining 100 per cent placement assistance, help students to develop communication and soft skills, and get a job in the desired field.

A. Top companies, such as IFB, Aditya Birla Group, L&T and TCS visit School of Engineering, VISTAS every year for the placement drive.

A. In total, 52 students got double job offers and over 20 students got more than two job offers.

A. ZOHO Corp. offered the highest salary package.

hostel_campus.college_name: School of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: VELS University has separate hostel facility for boys and girls. Laundry facility is available to the students on chargeable basis. Mess and Canteen facility is also available for the inmates at reasonable rates.

library.description:
VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies has a fully automated central library with a seating capacity of 500 persons and follows Open Access System. The library has a collection of 114305 books, 137717 e-books, and 10032 back volumes. It has the subscription of more than 359 Periodicals (National & International), more than 12381 e-journals, 4106 dissertations, 4849 audio-visual resources.
It also facilitates access to e-journals from IEEE/IEL, ASME, ASCE, EBSCO, ProQuest, BENTHAM Science Pharmacy, Micromedex’s Drugdex System, Inventi Online, Nature Online, Law finder, NPTEL etc.
The library is also an associate member of Madras Library Network (MALIBNET) and Institutional member British Council Library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Hockey Ground

reviews.review_heading: Reality of so called reputed university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is below average. You get pretty slow Wi-Fi in campuses, classrooms are cleaned once a week, medical facilities are not free and they are very expensive if it is an emergency too and the hostel is fine there is nothing too fancy or bad, but the food is bad.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good placements, faculty, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. AC classrooms with smart classes. Big auditorium. There's a library in which all journals, books, and e-books are available and easy to access. Hostels are good too, and hostel food is good. We have AC facilities in laboratories. Laboratories are good too.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VELS University, Pallavaram.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is really good and the college provides a big library with all the books. The classroom is neat and clean and has proper seating capacity. There is Wi-Fi in all departments. The hostel is very good and liberal.

reviews.review_heading: Kalvium excels in VELS with its work, program, offering great placements and a bright future.
reviews.review_text: The university offers reliable Wi-Fi connectivity, with excellent facilities in the labs and an average setup in the classrooms. The library is outstanding, providing students with a conducive learning environment. Additionally, the college provides a gym for hostlers, along with laundry services. However, the hostel is considered average and has strict rules. On a positive note, the mess and canteen serve good quality food. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports and games option...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. The Wi-Fi facility is average, but in the lab, very high-speed internet is available for learning, faculty research, and online resources. There are well-equipped computers with modern hardware and software to support multiple programming languages and other technical activities. Classrooms are equipped with projectors to enhance the learning experience. A huge library is available in our college. It has a vast collection of books, research papers, an...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university in Chennai.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very good. The infrastructure is decent. Separate hostels are available for both girls and boys. The hostel has Wi-Fi, beds, closets, etc. The food served in the hostel is average. Classrooms are well-maintained. The libraries are very good. Hostellers can go out every day at a particular time.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VELS School of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The department is clean and neat. Our classrooms are very neat and clean. The library is good. Labs and classrooms are good. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. A playground is available. Hostels are good. The quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. They provide cold water during summer days. The library staff members are very kind. Wi-Fi facility is available in the digital library to watch online video lectures. They give us all access to use any book.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Labs have CRT facilities. Classrooms are average. The library is well designed. Sports facilities are available, but they are only used on sports days.

reviews.review_heading: Advantages - Scholarships, Timings and Teacher's Support.
reviews.review_text: Facility members are good. There is a Central Library incorporated with a digital library, which is useful for the students. Food in the canteen is good. The college is not involved much in sports. Sports events are not informed beforehand otherwise they are good. If you're prepared then you can easily win in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is available in the department. The hostel is not good in both food and facility. The food served in the canteen is good. In the hostel, no one is going to take care of students' health, because there are no medical facilities. The food served is South Indian, and the mess is working.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college particularly for this department as it received NBA accreditation.
reviews.review_text: It provides all laboratories regarding our subject, well-designed equipment, Wi-Fi facilities, air-conditioner facility. But for big equipment like CT, MRI, students move to a hospital visit to learn about the website. Students have MatLab licenses installed, new computers, equipment, and all those.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has strict rules and a caring warden. Food, water and the quality are absolutely nice. The course offers lab and library access always. The infrastructure and facilities available in our college are really good and eye-catching. We have a digital library to download journals and books.

reviews.review_heading: Review of VELS School of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: As the biotech batch was started only in 2019, there were only a few facilities and infrastructure for us to do our project. Classrooms were well spacious, and the library was top-notch, which is my favourite place in the entire college. We can utilise our free time to develop skills and educate ourselves in various fields in the library. Our digital library is world-class.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty, no placements, no sports opportunity.
reviews.review_text:
The college internet is not so good. Labs don't have enough equipment so that all students can perform experiments. Classrooms are somewhat okay and the library infrastructure is superb but most of the books are old dated and out of edition. 
I was not a hostel student. There are two grounds in the college but you don't get to play any sports as they are occupied for vehicle parking.

LIT University Nagpur popular programmes are BTech and MTech. BTech and MTech students are placed in top companies such as Galaxy Surfactants Ltd., Honeywell, Godrej Industries Ltd, and others. BTech students can become Engineers or can even join non-technical fields such as Marketing, Sales, and others.
BTech students are taught Engineering Graphics, Engineering Workshop Skills, and several other skills. MTech students are taught Communication Skills, Engineering and Solid Mechanics, and several other skills. fees_and_eligibility.overview: LIT Nagpur offers PG and UG courses to students. These courses are provided across Engineering and various other streams. At the UG level, the university offers BTech courses to students. At the PG level, the university offers MTech and MSc prorammes to students. The university also provides PhD programmes to students. BTech students are taught subjects such as Design of Experiments, Advanced Separation Processes, and others as per the specialisation opted by the student. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by LIT University Nagpur and their respective eligibility and LIT University Nagpur fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you are eligible to join without CUET but not without MHT CET i.e. Maharashtra state entrance examination. For admission to BTech, candidates can apply through JEE Main, ICAR AIEEA, and others. MTech aspirants can apply through GATE, and others. So prepare well in advance for a successful admission to various courses at LIT Nagpur.
faqs.question: Can I join LIT Nagpur without CUET?

faqs.answer: A:    At the undergraduate level, Laxminarayan Institute of Technology offers BTech courses to students. The total fee for BTech is not available on the official website. Keep visiting the official website for updated information. To apply for admission to the BTech course, candidates must clear the entrance exams with a valid score. The accepted entrance exams are JEE Main, MHT CET, ICAR AIEEA, and others.
faqs.question: What is the course fee for LIT Nagpur BTech programme?

faqs.answer: A:    Eligibility criteria for BTech in LIT University Nagpur are 45% marks in class 12 with valid JEE Main scores. The average return on investment in the programme is INR 5 Lacs per year, and students get placed in their final year of graduation.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech at LIT University Nagpur? What is the ROI for this course?

faqs.answer: A:    LIT Nagpur also take admission on the basis of JEE marks but not JEE is compulsory for tge admission in this college. LIT also take admission in different courses on the basis of the state government exam conducted by the state government of maharashtra. The exams like MHTCET plays an important role in admission in this college it is the state level exam conducted for intake in different courses in about all colleges of maharashtra .

overview_faqs.question: Are pursuing UG courses at LIT Nagpur expensive?
overview_faqs.answer: According to students' reviews, pursuing UG courses like B.Tech is not very expensive at Laxminarayan Institute of Technology, Nagpur. With the quality provided by the college for the students, they are not charging too much fee from the student. As compared to other colleges all over Maharashtra they are not much expensive. The average per year fee of a B.Tech course is about INR 115000. This college is best for medium-budget students who want to seek quality education.

overview_faqs.question: What is the course fee for LIT Nagpur BTech programme?
overview_faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, Laxminarayan Institute of Technology offers BTech courses to students. The total fee for BTech is not available on the official website. Keep visiting the official website for updated information. To apply for admission to the BTech course, candidates must clear the entrance exams with a valid score. The accepted entrance exams are JEE Main, MHT CET, ICAR AIEEA, and others.

overview_faqs.question: When was LIT University Nagpur established? How many branches does it have?
overview_faqs.answer: Laxminarayan Innovation Technological University Nagpur (earlier known as LIT Nagpur) was established in 1942. The university, through 6 schools of study, offers postgraduate, undergraduate, and PhD programmes to students. These courses are provided across Engineering and various other streams. The flagship programmes offered by the university are MTech and BTech.

content.Placements: The highest and average salary packages offered by recruiters are 19.5 lakhs and 3.6 lakhs per annum respectively. We have many placement and internship opportunities. There is a strong alumni network that connects through various social apps sharing links to online courses and other useful information.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-maintained with all necessary facilities. Our college supports various extracurricular activities such as cultural events, clubs, tours, and more. Medical emergencies are handled within the college and we have won many trophies in sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Extremely good college for the chemical science course.

content.Placements: At our college, students were getting enough placement opportunities. Almost 42% of my batchmates get successfully placed. The highest package offered was 13 LPA. The lowest package offered was 3.6 LPA. The average package offered was 5.2 LPA at this college. The top recruiters in the college were BPCL, Adani, Reliance, HPCL, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college for chemical science was good. The college had a wide campus on which all the necessary facilities were available. The college labs had all the necessary equipment and safety equipment. Wi-Fi and a library facility were also available on campus. Sports and medical facilities were also available at the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Petrochemical Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent government college, according to studies and placements.

content.Placements: In our college, about 70% of students are placed. Top recruiting companies like Reliance, Adani, JK Paper, Cadbury, etc., visit our campus. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA to 6 LPA. If you are skilled, you can achieve more than 10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college was established in 1943. The infrastructure is old. Our classrooms are good. Labs are well maintained. Wi-Fi is not available in the college but is available in the hostel. The hostel fee is Rs.500 per year. Projectors are available in classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: LIT is a very well-known and reputed college in Maharashtra.

content.Placements: 100% of students got placed based on their performance in academics. The average package offered is nearly 6-7 LPA. The recruiting companies are Adani, Lupin, Reliance, Mapro, Nerolac, Berger, Asian Paints, Jotun, Arti Industry, Galaxy Serfcatant, Fiat, Plasto, Sundar Biscuits etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The hostel is available for boys only. The girls' hostel is of our university nearby campus. The hostels are big, and each room is shared by 2 students. Each student gets a bed, table, chair and cupboard. Rooms are big enough. The cost is very low, i.e., 2,000 per year. Food technology department has various new equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college. It's good in academics, great in sports and has really good placements.

content.Placements: I am doing electrical and electronics engineering. Around 80% of students were placed from our college. All the tech companies like TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra and core companies also visit here. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 4 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available here, but its speed is very slow, and there are network issues with Airtel. If you use Idea and Vodafone or Jio, then it's fine. Classrooms are well, and there are good labs. The library is great. The hostel is fine but not much spacious. However, the food served in the hostel is great.

admission_overview.college_name: LIT University Nagpur Course Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: Laxminarayan Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Laxminarayan Institute of Technology Nagpur (LIT Nagpur) admissions are offered to UG and PG levels.LIT Nagpurcourses are provided across Engineering, Food Technology, and various other streams. The selection is based on the entrance exam scores. For Btech candidate needs to appear for the JEE main and for Mtech GATE score along with CAP counselling is required. LIT College Nagpur's flagship courses provided by the college are BTech and MTech. The college is approved by UGC.

Candidates interested in getting into LIT Nagpur are required to follow the JEE Main, GATE entrance exam and LIT Nagpur application process. Check out the table below for details onLIT Nagpur course admissionwhich is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:

The fee structure for different courses at the LIT Nagpur varies with the specialisation with which they are available. The following table mentions all the popularLIT Nagpur coursesalong with their total tuition fee:
Seat Intake
LIT Nagpur course admissions 2025 for al of its courses is done based on entrance exams. Check below the complete LIT Nagpur admission process:
Application:The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.

Selection rounds:LIT Nagpur BTech admission is through theMHT CETscore. Candidates with a validJEE Mainare also eligible to seek admission for the MTech programme Candidates require validGATEscore followed by Centralised Admission Process (CAP) Counselling conducted by DTE Maharashtra.

Admission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay acourse feeto confirm their seat in the college/university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech at LIT University Nagpur? What is the ROI for this course?
faqs.answer: Eligibility criteria for BTech in LIT University Nagpur are 45% marks in class 12 with valid JEE Main scores. The average return on investment in the programme is INR 5 Lacs per year, and students get placed in their final year of graduation.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Tech at Laxminarayan Institute of Technology, Nagpur?
faqs.answer: LIT University Nagpur offers a total number of 150 seats in BTech. It provides this also at the specialisation level. For instance, 15 seats are provided for BTech in Surface Coating Technology, 12 for Paper and Pulp Technology, Plastic and Polymer Technology and Petrochemical Technology and 12 for Oil Technology.LIT University Nagpur offers a total number of 150 seats in BTech. It provides this also at the specialisation level. For instance, 15 seats are provided for BTech in Surface Coating Te

faqs.question: Are pursuing UG courses at LIT Nagpur expensive?
faqs.answer: According to students' reviews, pursuing UG courses like B.Tech is not very expensive at Laxminarayan Institute of Technology, Nagpur. With the quality provided by the college for the students, they are not charging too much fee from the student. As compared to other colleges all over Maharashtra they are not much expensive.The average per year fee of a B.Tech course is about INR 115000. This college is best for medium-budget students who want to seek quality education.

faqs.question: How many rounds are there in LIT Nagpur Counseling 2023?
faqs.answer: LIT Nagpur Counseling 2023 went up to 3 rounds.Regarding the MHT CET cutoff for the previous three years, the LIT Nagpur cutoff for a B.Tech in Chemical Engineering ended at 91.27 in 2023,  90.85 in 2022, and 93.62 in 2021 for candidates in the General Home State category. The LIT Nagpur cutoff for the B.Tech. in Petrochemical Technology closed at 87.94 in 2023,  90.85 in 2022, and 93.62 in 2021. courses_data.name: LIT Nagpur MTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MCAER CET, MHTCET MTech, GATE
courses_data.description: Candidates seeking admission to MTech programme at LIT Nagpur must have a validGATEscore. Further shortlisting of the candidates is done based on CAP counselling conducted by DTE, Maharashtra. Candidates should also meet the below-mentioned eligibility criteria to qualify for admission: MTech Specialisation Eligibility Criteria Chemical Engineering Qualifying exam:MHT CET/ JEE Main Eligibility:BE/ BTech or equivalent in relevant stream from a recognised institute/ university with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST candidates) Food Technology Petroleum and Petrochemical Technology Paint Technology Oil Technology Check all five MTech specialisations, fees and student reviews

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for M.Tech at Laxminarayan Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: The total seats in M.Tech programmes at LIT University Nagpur are 60, and that is divided into specializations and each specialisation holds 12 seats. Thus, the M.Tech Petrochemical Technology, M.Tech Paint Technology, M.Tech Oil Technology, M.Tech Chemical Engineering, and M.Tech Food Technology provide seats for 12 students each.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria at LIT Nagpur apart from national-level entrance exams?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for admission in LIT Nagpur apart from national level entrance exam is first the student has passed his 12th exam with recognised board with minimum of 50 to 60 percent marks.Apart from national level entrance exam the state level exam like MHTCET is also conducted for the student to take admission in different courses in LIT Nagpur . Admission also conducted on merit basis of class 12 marks .

faqs.question: How many rounds are there in LIT Nagpur Counseling 2023?
faqs.answer: LIT Nagpur cutoff 2023 for admission to the BTech course was concluded after Round 3. Considering the LIT Nagpur last-round cutoff, the closing scores for BTech ranged between 93.49 and 61.53. During Laxminarayan Institute of Technology cutoff 2023, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering was the most competitive specialisation with a closing score of 93.49 in the last round. In 2022 and 2021, the last round closing score for B.Tech. in Computer Engineering was 89.75 and 91.7, respectively.

faqs.question: Can I join LIT Nagpur without CUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, you are eligible to join withoutCUETbut not withoutMHT CETi.e. Maharashtra state entrance examination. For admission to BTech, candidates can apply throughJEE Main,ICAR AIEEA, and others. MTech aspirants can apply throughGATE, and others. So prepare well in advance for a successful admission to various courses at LIT Nagpur.

reviews.review_heading: Laxminarayan Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well-maintained with all necessary facilities. Our college supports various extracurricular activities such as cultural events, clubs, tours, and more. Medical emergencies are handled within the college and we have won many trophies in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Extremely good college for the chemical science course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college for chemical science was good. The college had a wide campus on which all the necessary facilities were available. The college labs had all the necessary equipment and safety equipment. Wi-Fi and a library facility were also available on campus. Sports and medical facilities were also available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent government college, according to studies and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college was established in 1943. The infrastructure is old. Our classrooms are good. Labs are well maintained. Wi-Fi is not available in the college but is available in the hostel. The hostel fee is Rs.500 per year. Projectors are available in classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: LIT is a very well-known and reputed college in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The hostel is available for boys only. The girls' hostel is of our university nearby campus. The hostels are big, and each room is shared by 2 students. Each student gets a bed, table, chair and cupboard. Rooms are big enough. The cost is very low, i.e., 2,000 per year. Food technology department has various new equipment.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college. It's good in academics, great in sports and has really good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available here, but its speed is very slow, and there are network issues with Airtel. If you use Idea and Vodafone or Jio, then it's fine. Classrooms are well, and there are good labs. The library is great. The hostel is fine but not much spacious. However, the food served in the hostel is great.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Laxminarayan Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college is specifically for the chemical engineering course. The campus is green and has a lot of space. Labs are sufficient. The hostel is good. The college entry charges Rs. 1,500 per annum for the hostel, which is quite affordable. The library has books. The college provides the BT card in which we can take two books for 14 days, and we have to renew it.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are highly qualified, experienced, knowledgeable and very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college have never been its distinctive point. The college has improved a lot in terms of infrastructure like labs, library, classrooms. Open Wi-Fi was not available until 2017. Quality of food, medical is not so good but it's manageable. Sports and games are mostly students oriented where students take up responsibilities and then they have the freedom to organise the best they can.

reviews.review_heading: There are experienced faculty members, and the placements are fine.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good, and the buildings are good, but they are very old for us now. So our college should do some new renovations to the buildings. Our college provides a Wi-Fi facility for us, and there are different departments according to the subjects. There are different labs to perform our practicals. Our college has a fine canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Laxminarayan Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Hostel fees are nominal over here, and it is only available for 1st-year students for boys. For girls, it's until 4th year. Infrastructure is great for excellence and science building. The main campus is too old. It is not high. The charges are Rs. 20,000-25,000 per annum, and for meals, it's Rs. 12000 per annum extra. It's enough to stay at the college, and it's also flexible. Moreover, reserved students get all fees and expenses return in terms of scholarships.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent records of placement.
reviews.review_text: Huge well developed library is available in laxminarayan institute of technology. All books required for all courses of B.Tech, M.Tech and Ph.D. are available in this Library. Infrastructure of lit library is excellent. Hostel facility is available for boys and girls with Wi-Fi, good quality of food, canteen and playground.

reviews.review_heading: There is a nice environment. Lots of opportunities are provided and placements are the best.
reviews.review_text: Labs were equipped with all the essential apparatus. The library is present within the campus, where you can find all kinds of books related to the course, but the timings are from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM. Classrooms are spacious with digital projectors and some with a smart TV. Hostels are available for both boys and girls, but the priority is given for non-native students. Food quality is also good.

reviews.review_heading: LIT is the first step towards success.
reviews.review_text: The newly built chemical engineering department is the best a student can dream of, but certain areas needed to be reconstructed. Some are already under maintenance, I guarantee soon or later, it will be a world-class infrastructure. The canteen has been updated on the demand of students. The main building is currently the thing for which college is known for, i.e., the clock at the top is quite famous.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges for students who aspire to become an excellent chemical engineer.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Laxminarayan Institute of Technology wasn't very good during my admission, but it was improved gradually, and now, some modern facilities are available on the campus. Wi-Fi, labs and projectors are available. The campus has a friendly environment.

reviews.review_heading: Put in good efforts for better opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is not good, but it can satisfy all our needs. We have free Wi-Fi facility with good speed. The college has required machinery in the labs that you can't find such machinery in any other private engineering college.

reviews.review_heading: The best chemical engineering college in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: As far as the infrastructure is concerned, it was well-built by the college management. The old buildings are interesting and beautifully maintained. The college is on the highway with a wide campus area. There is hostel facility for the students with separate rooms for different year students.

review_content.Placements: In our college, an average 60% of students are placed every year in my course. review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are really great. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure, faculty, and placement opportunities are average.

content.Placements: Most companies that visit this college offer roles in SDE, web development, sales, etc. Here, only mass recruiters visit, not the Faang companies. Even though this college is a branch of BIT Mesra, the management faculty members are ill and have an ignoring behavior. Students pay a huge money, but do not get the placement or internship assistance.
content.Infrastructure: The basic facilities are not provided in our college even after paying a huge amount. The mess food quality is very bad. Sometimes insects and worms are seen in the food. Boys are suffering from typhoid and other diseases by eating the poor mess food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: About BIT Deoghar!

content.Placements: In Computer Science and Engineering, the placement rate is around 90%. A minimum of 7.5 CGPA is required for students to sit in placements. The minimum package was 4 LPA, the average was 7 LPA, and the highest was around 14 LPA. Companies like Wipro visit here.
content.Infrastructure: The mess food is okayish. Rooms have fans, not air-conditioned. LAN is available, but there is no Wi-Fi. The library does have Wi-Fi as well as AC. Classrooms have fans. The infrastructure is average. The hostel room does not have wardrobes; it’s all open. The room size is quite nice for 2-3 people.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good, with the best classrooms, labs with ACs, a neat and clean campus, and good hostels. Rooms in the hostels are very big for staying. Free Wi-Fi, 24x7 electricity. The hostel of this college is much better than the other colleges. reviews.review_heading: I am quite satisfied with my college because the curriculum is good & the placements are great.
reviews.review_text: The campus life of BITD is  great. There is a decent library where variety of books and journals are issued. There are projectors and smart boards in almost every classroom which are rarely used. There is a new area built solely for fun and gaming activities.

reviews.review_heading: I an satisfied with colleges placements and facilities provided here.
reviews.review_text: Institute is well-equipped with all types of facilities like hi teach classroom with projectors and well furnished, Wi-Fi is all over the campus. Library facility is also good equipped with all types of books, research paper, journals etc. Canteen is also good. A sports ground is also there.

reviews.review_heading: Campus near deoghar is like heaven on earth.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are apt and enough to get a good academics and CGPA along with placement. Sports complex is where all types of sports like badminton, hockey, volleyball, basketball, cricket, table tennis, tennis and football ground. A running track is there.

reviews.review_heading: Great place to study for BCA and B.Teach.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is currently under renovation. As per my feedback earlier during my course time it was rea rusty. Therefore I would also like to add that the cafeteria needs a lot of work and modern college design would help a lot in terms of college rep.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is worth the fee paid.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is not big but it provides a good education. Lab facilities are very good, clean, and well-maintained with updated systems. It has a great library for syllabus-related books. Hostel security is strict. The food served is average. Medical facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the academics and placements, but the infrastructure and facilities are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure consists of one main building in which B.Tech courses are conducted and one building with different courses like agriculture, BBA, etc. It also consists of a canteen, a dispensary, and an electric building. There are several faculty quarters. The quality of facilities in our hostel is good. The quality of the food in the mess and canteen is good compared to that of other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not very good. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms with smart boards are available. The library has efficient books. The quality of the food is good. Medical facilities, along with an ambulance, are provided. Doctors are also available. The canteen is open during college hours. Sports opportunities are provided. Different sports grounds are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Deoghar Extension Center.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, as there is LAN access available for you in each room, mostly labs. Classrooms are good, the library has 99% of books in our course, and there are many novels to read. The quality of facilities in the hostel is average. The major thing, which is food, is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Birla Institute of Technology, Mesra - Deoghar Extension Center.
reviews.review_text: There are two hostels for boys and one for girls, separated by approximately 700 meters. A clean place and fresh oxygen are very much needed. Our college is in a slight hill area.

reviews.review_heading: Its a good college, you get bit mesra's degree with no mention of  anywhere.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay. I mean, it could have been better. But still, it is manageable. The classroom is good could have been good. There is one library in our college, not a very large one. There is a badminton and basketball court. Hostel life here is good if you have got good friends. Food quality is sometimes good, sometimes poor.
